publishedfiledetails.title: '63 Volkswagen 1300 Beetle
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
The Beetle! It comes in 3 flavours: the classic one we all know, small light and fun to drive, dune buggy variant for the adventurers and the high performance one for the racing enthusiasts. They all have their unique features but share most of the parts for easy maintenance. They all can be equipped with craftable set of armor, roofracks and many other things.
 
[b]Main features:[/b]
[list]
[*]3 Chassis variants with their own features: Stock, Dune Buggy and High Performance
[*]2 tiered protection with 3 front bumpers and 2 rear bumpers
[*]Fully animated hood, trunk, doors and windows
[*]Visible interior and character (with improved exit/enter/aim animations)
[*]All parts have 3d objects you can remove and place in the world
[*]Extra parts to craft and find in the world to make the vehicle truly yours (bumpers, window armor, roofracks, bodykits etc)
[*]Multiple texture variations
[*]Armor protection for windows, doors, engine, headlights etc
[*]4 seats on the stock variant and 2 seats on other two
[/list]
[b][list]
[*]You can use it in your current save game, just enable the mod in the load menu
[*]It can tow and be towed
[*]Not recolorable
[/list][/b]

If you can't wait to find this mod in your game and want to test it right away, use [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2634426926]bikinitools[/url] to spawn it, hide the items that your character holds while in vehicle, or for all other good stuff that mod has, go get it!

[b]If you like my mods, please consider supporting me with a coffee[/b],
so I don't fall asleep while making new mods and supporting old ones :)

[url=https://ko-fi.com/ki5mods][img]https://i.imgur.com/2uTskWl.png[/img][/url]

Check out my vehicle mods:

publishedfiledetails.title: '86 Oshkosh P19A + Military Trailers
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
It's the end of the world, food, fuel and beer are running low, zombies are ruining every base you make, it's time to go full nomad. Move from place to place, loot all the places and move on. P19A is the perfect vehicle for that. Built to last for decades in warzones and harsh terrain. There are 4 variants, every with it's own set of unique features.

[b]Main features:[/b]
[list]
[*]3 Chassis variants: KY Fire Department, USMC Truck and Rare Fortress Truck (Burnt one included)
[*]They all have escape hatch on the roof that takes passenger of the 4th seat to the back left corner of truck
[*]Seats 3 and 4 can't be accessed by zombies, so they are good for sleeping in case you don't have armor plates.
[*]Fully animated hood, trunk doors, doors and windows
[*]Visible interior and character (with improved exit/enter/aim animations)
[*]All parts have 3d objects you can remove and place in the world
[*]Extra parts to find in the world to make the vehicle truly yours (fenders, armor plates, roofracks, spare tire mounts etc)
[*]Run-flat Tires - They will run even when damaged, but with reduced friction
[*]Many texture variations
[*]Armor plates for windows and engine protection[/list]

[b]Military Trailers[/b]
[list]
[*][b]M1082 Trailer[/b]
[*][b]M1082 Covered Trailer[/b]
[*][b]M1095 Trailer[/b]
[*][b]M1095 Covered Trailer[/b]
[/list]

Trailers are compatible with any military vehicle mods, just don't try to attach them to small cars, it will probably not work. 

[b][list]
[*]New vehicles, not replacing any other
[*]You can use it in your current save game, just enable the mod in the load menu
[*]4 seats inside
[*]It can tow and be towed
[*]Not recolorable
[/list][/b]

so I don't fall asleep while making new mods and supporting old ones :)

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41 / B42] Load All Magazines
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
*** I changed the mod ID back to ReloadAllMagazines, since the \ in the ID was causing problems. You will need to reselect the mod in your mod list, or on a mutiplayer server change the mod ID in the text file. Sorry for the inconvenience. ***


Adds an option to the right click context menu to load/unload all magazines of the selected type. Does not effect radial menu reloading.

Modifies ISInventoryPaneContextMenu.doMagazineMenu, so will be incompatible with any other mods that change this function.

Works in multiplayer.
Works with Brita's, Arsenal Gun Fighter, Vanilla Firearms Expansion and others as long as they don't modify the right click context menu.

Workshop ID: 2920899878
Mod ID: ReloadAllMagazines

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41] Every Texture Optimized
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[H2]Mod Purpose:[/H2]
Enhance and optimizes game textures that are not included in the tiles, increases performance
[H2]Features:[/H2]
[b]•[/b] Increased texture details
[b]•[/b] Quality mode – Lossless version, for Modern PCs where players prefer maximum texture quality with peak performance
[b]•[/b] Optimal mode – Near-lossless version, the “sweet spot” for those who want the maximum in performance and texture quality
[b]•[/b] Performance mode – Lossy version, for Laptops and Weak PCs where important to squeeze out maximum performance, but at the same time play on decent texture quality
[H2]How to install:[/H2]
Activate in game, or overwrite game files
[H2]Compatibility:[/H2]
Compatible with any mod, depends only on the order of installation. If you want this mod overwrite another mod, it must be lower on the list of that mod
[H2]Restrictions:[/H2]
I give permission to use and edit my mod

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41] Fuel Side Indicator
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h2]FOR B41 ONLY. DOES NOT WORK WITH B42[/h2]
The Indie Stone has already added this feature in vanilla! So you do not have to install this mod if you are in B42.

It's been an honor. Thank you all for the awards and support given through the years. o7
          - Kabaww

[hr][/hr]

[h1]EXCITING NEWS![/h1]
The latest blog post by The Indie Stone (https://projectzomboid.com/blog/news/2023/11/one-door-openz/) seems to hint that they will add a fuel-side indicator to the vanilla game on Build 42. 
I'm so happy that the developers noticed this small UI/UX tweak enough to warrant it to be in the base game. It has always been my intention to make this mod in the hopes of getting it implemented in vanilla.
Cheers to all who have supported this mod and I'm sure it will still come handy until B42 comes out.

Also,
This mod still works even though it's been over a year since I updated it. Works for Build 41.78+.


[hr][/hr]

[h1] Build 41.68 Patch [/h1]
- Fixed error with Agrotsar Tractor*
- Fixed compatibility with two-wheeled vehicles**

**For some bikes, the mod makers made it so that you could refuel on both sides, in this case I have disabled the indicator.
*You may also find that the indicator does not appear in certain vehicles, this is because the mod makers have done some weird stuff on their vehicles that hinders this mod to get info on the gas tank location. One example of this is the Agrotsar Tractor that does not have a gas tank area which this mod relies on. 

[b]This mod should be loaded LAST. Specifically, after enabling other vehicle mods.[/b]
For server owners, place FSI at the end of the list of mods or after other vehicle mods. 

[hr][/hr]

[h1] Description [/h1]

Find it annoying to turn your vehicle around in a gas station and attracting MORE zombies? Do you wish there was a way to know which side your car's gas tank is at? 

[i]Fuel Side Indicator[/i] is a simple addition to your vehicle's dashboard that lets you know which side you have to park your car when refuelling!


[hr][/hr]
[h1] Author's Notes [/h1]

This is my first UI mod! Please be patient with any bugs you may encounter and report them in the comments below.

- No need for a new save, just enable it and you're ready
- To disable, just disable the mod itself

Big thanks to the PZ discord modding community! Special shout out to Shurutsue as well!

COMPATIBILITY: Build 41 ONLY
*Compatible with ALL vehicle mods! (as long as the vehicle has wheels)
*If you have a mod that tweaks the vehicle dashboard, this mod [i]may[/i] conflict with it but not likely if it's a minor tweak.

MULTIPLAYER COMPATIBILITY: 
* This should work since this is a client-side mod. Let me know down in the comments if you have trouble with the mod on your server.



REPACKING is ALLOWED. 
Just credit me and don't whine at me when something breaks when you repack.


Workshop ID: 2616986064
Mod ID: fuelsideindicator

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41] Simple Overhaul: Melee Weapons (SOMW)
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Simple Overhaul: Melee Weapons (SOMW)[/h1]
For Project Zomboid ver. 41.78 [B41]. Works in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer.
Included translations: EN, RU, CH, CN, IT, DE, KO, UA, TH, PTBR, ES, AR, JP, TR, PL.

[h2]FEATURES:[/h2]
- New fresh models and textures for almost all melee weapons from game. Everything is created and optimized for better quality without losing performance!
- Over 40+ new lore-friendly weapons which exists in 1993. Nothing weird or futuristic, just real tools and weapons!
- Melee weapons from the original game has been gently and carefully rebalanced. Now every weapon feels bit unique and different from each other!
- Slightly adjusted mechanics for Short Blade and Short Blunt weapons to make them better. Now you don't have to run around with crowbars or axes, because they are simply stronger than the rest.
- Fixed icons. Finally, the color of Screwdriver on the icon is the same as its game model!
- Now you can use Tree Branch as weapon. Yes, you read it right!
- Fixed blood overlay. Now blood on weapons will appear where it should - at the point of impact!
- Spears made from branches and spears made from planks are now visually different now. Small but nice detail!
- New recipes for upgrading your Baseball Bats. Wanted to wrap some wire around a bat? Now it's possible!
- New recipes for creating improvised weapons. Make Axe from Shovel, convert Broom into a spear, and saw a Long Metal Pipe into a short version!
- Fixed recipes for creating spears. Now you can make spears with good condition, also making spears does not depend on the Carpentry skill, and weapons can also be attached with Scotch Tape!
- Submod "Easy spear Attachments" will allow you to attach weapons to spears with Twine and Adhesive tape!

The full list of changes can be found [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3052668642/3882725182509908122]here[/url].

[h2]COMPATIBILITY:[/h2]
- Everything about mods compatibilty [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3052668642/6770657890633738221]HERE[/url].

[h2]FAQ:[/h2]
[b]Is it safe to add or remove a mod from a current game?[/b]
I recommend starting a new game with the mod, but it's not necessary.
You can add mod in current game, but most changes will only affect weapons that have not yet been found by the players. All existing Tree Branches will disappear, because their item type was changed but you still be able to get new ones.
You can remove mod from current game, but most changes will only affect weapons that have not yet been found by the players. All existing Tree Branches will disappear, because their item type was changed but you still be able to get new ones. All spears made from planks will disappear.

[h2]CREDITS:[/h2]

[b]Acid Finesse[/b] - models, support.
[b]Star[/b] - assisting with code.

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41/B42] More Immersive Vehicles
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
B41/B42

Project Zomboid is quite a realistic game, but the developers missed one point. Vehicles in the world appear only with closed doors, raised windows and closed trunks. This mod adds more immersiveness and atmosphere to the game! Vehicles can now have doors open, windows down, or trunks open.

I highly recommend using this mod along with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2807356025]Shark and Cytt's Kentucky Car Overhaul[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2490220997]vehicles by KI5[/url].
Don't forget to adjust the probabilities in the sandbox settings!

You can now separately configure probabilities for vehicles in a parking stall, as well as on the road or in traffic jams!

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41/B42] Rain Cleans Blood
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Tired of zombies splattering their brains all over your pretty lawn? Well no more! Just wait for some rain or snow and watch it all fade away.

[h1]What does it do?[/h1]
This mod makes it so that when it's raining or snowing, blood will slowly fade away from floors and walls nearby.

[h1]Doesn't Rain Wash do this already?[/h1]
That mod cleans your clothes and recent car. This mod complements that.

[h1]Does it work in multiplayer?[/h1]
Yes, it does!

[h1]What about ash?[/h1]
Same as blood, ashes will also slowly be cleaned when it's raining.

[h1]Can I add this to my current game?[/h1]
Yes, you can add or remove this mod whenever you like. It contains no save-breaking features.

[h1]How does it work?[/h1]
Every game tick the mod will look at the current weather and if it's moderately raining or snowing, it will randomly select 8 tiles in the same chunk as you and clean them if they are bloodied.

[h1]Why not always?[/h1]
Because immersion is important to me. I also opted for a more gradual process to save on performance and to give the feature the feeling of "washing away".


[url=https://ko-fi.com/G2G8TCZ05][img]https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi3.png?v=3[/img][/url]

Workshop ID: 2956146279
Mod ID: RainCleansBlood

publishedfiledetails.title: [B41/B42/B42.13+] Simple Overhaul: Traits and Occupations (SOTO)
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Simple Overhaul: Traits and Occupations or just SOTO[/h1]

Please, rate mod for promotion. It will motivate me to make more content! Thank you <3

[b]Features:
- Rebalanced vanilla occupations, making all of them worth to pick.
- Rebalanced vanilla traits, some of them was completely reworked.
- Adds more than 40 new balanced and necessary traits.
- Adds 26 new vanilla-friendly occupations: Tailor, Deliveryman, Loader, Truck Driver, Soldier, Botanist, Grave Digger, Dancer, Priest, Weightlifting Instructor, Detective, School Teacher, Cleaner, Stuntman, Gas Station Operator, Camp Counselor, Drag Racer, Junkyard Worker, Lifeguard, Demolition Worker, Butcher, Paparazzi, Miner, Store Employee, Criminal, Animal Control Officer.
- New unique traits for vanilla and SOTO occupations.
- You can earn or lose traits while playing the game. For example, you can become Baseball Player, Brave or quit Smoking.
- Visual style that matches the original game.
- Sandbox Options.[/b]

[b]This all-in-one mod is standalone, which means you don't need anything else to make it work.
This core mod changes traits and occupations from vanilla game, also adds more new features.
Balance and flexibility are two fundamentals.
Fair traits costs and no cheating.
Meanwhile trying to still be close to Vanilla-style gameplay[/b]

Works in [B41/B42/B42.13+]
Mod should work completely fine in singleplayer and multiplayer.
Only for fresh game. Unknown bugs can appear with adding it in current savegame.

Summary:
* Most overpowered traits nerfed.
* Most underpowered and unpopular traits buffed.
* Occupations balanced around same way. Occupation start with maximum +2 skill level (except Farmer, Chef and Doctor).
* If you want to understand mod ideology you should check [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2840805724/3459347019170992971/]Questions and Answers[/url].

[h1]You can find more info about all this stuff here for B41 (Google Sheets):[/h1]
>>> https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FlcV3lKgHqfWixly7OwRVYnJHQJ7XhaH5XEHRwEF2DY/edit?usp=sharing <<<
[u]You should copy-paste this link in browser because Steam not allowing to open Google Sheets directly.[/u]
First tab for Traits, second tab for Occupations.

Traits and occupations are balanced from time to time to achieve the ideal state.
Don't be surprised if your favorite trait or occupation buffed/nerfed.

You can discuss this mod in comments or in my discord: https://discord.gg/sSBnUxADDK

Recommended mods:
- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2685168362]More Description for Traits[/url]

[h1]IN B42.13 SOTO MAY NOT BE COMPATIBLE WITH ANY TRAITS MOD!!![/h1]

Compatible with:
- (mostly everything but incompatible mods)
- Smoker
- Better Lockpicking (traits)
- Snake's Mod Pack (weight traits)
- Green Fire (alcoholic mutually exclusives)
- Scavenger Skill and Driving Skill (skills for some occupations)
- Excrementum (Sensitive Digestion trait)
- Skill Recovery Journal
- Evolving Traits World: should works fine but with bunch of +1 traits.

SOTO may work bad or be incompatible with next mods:
- any mods which changes vanilla traits and occupations
- any traits which changes Smoker trait and adding Alcoholic trait (required testing)
- Quit Smoking: SOTO already allow you to quit smoking.
- Become Desensitized/Brave: SOTO already allow you to earn Brave/Desensitized traits.
- Extra Traits Effects: both mods affecting same traits, incompatible traits balance. (but you can load ETE after SOTO to make it work.)

Incompatible (and will not be):
- More Simple Traits: SOTO is expanded MST. You may face duplicated traits and unknown errors. Use SOTO or MST.
- More Traits: some traits will not work or work incorrectly, incompatible traits balance. Use at own risk.
- Dynamic Traits: both mods affecting occupations and traits, while doing pretty the same thing in different ways, incompatible occupations and traits balance.
- Occupations Expertises & Balance: both mods changing occupations and I don't want to see traits from both mods at same time, incompatible occupations and traits balance.
- 10 Years Later Professions and Occupations: both mods affecting occupations, incompatible occupations and traits balance.

You always can ask your fave mod developer to add compatibility with SOTO.

[b]I will not make separated occupations mod, do not ask me for.[/b]

publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b]Reorder Containers[/b] is an inventory mod that allows you to customize the order in which containers and backpacks appear in the inventory.

Simply drag and drop the container icons to rearrange them to your liking.
They'll even remember their preferred order if you drop the backpack and re-equip it later.


You also have the option to rearrange containers in the loot window, [b]but you need to turn it on using the options at the bottom of the loot window (next to the lock)[/b]

The drag and drop system will automatically handle the sorting priority by default.

publishedfiledetails.title: [B42/B41] The Motorious Zone Vehicle Pack
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
This mod will add several vehicles to the game. The vehicles are vanilla-styled (including lore-friendly names, or optional real names), era appropriate (1993 and earlier), and support all the features of vanilla vehicles. The pack will be a variety pack, aiming to add a little bit of everything to the game from everyday sedans, vans and SUVs to sports cars, with sports cars being much more rare than everyday machines.

All cars that are capable of it also support [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2281256511]Paint Your Ride[/url] in B41, or [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=3464606086]HDCP Immersive Vehicle Paint[/url] in B42!

[h1]Also supports Build 42![/h1]
The ID is slightly different for B42 (finally fixed the typo in it), but the B41 version should still work fine
[h1]!!//////////////////////Notes for B42\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\!![/h1]
[list][*]The max vehicle texture size must be at least 1024 for now. The textures break if the game has to scale them down currently. [b]Texture compression does still work, and can be enabled if you need it[/b]
[*]If the vehicle mechanics UI doesn't work, another mod in your list is likely breaking it. Mods that haven't updated to the new crafting system can break UI elements, and any mod that breaks the mechanics UI can also break other UI elements as well.
[/list]


[h1]If you were using my existing standalone vehicle mods, it is [b][u]safe (and best)[/u][/b] to switch to this mod.[/h1]
This mod contains the following vehicle mods of mine: Lancia Stratos, R32 Skyline, Supra, Fox Body, Kei Sports, LM002, 240SX Coupe, Diablo, 300ZX, GT40, Miata, Toyota X90s, and Reliant Robin Mk. II. Disable these mods and use this instead if you plan on using this mod, as they can cause issues when used together.

[h1]You can choose which cars you would like to spawn naturally, from 3 selections of car lists[/h1]
[b][u]If you want all cars to spawn, you don't need to enable the optional Spawn Selection sub-mods[/u][/b]
To choose which types of cars you'd like to have spawn, enable the Spawn Selection sub-mods of the cars you would like to allow to spawn in addition to the main mod. There are 3 lists to choose from, and you can select any combination of them: [list]
[*][b]US Motors:[/b] This list contains cars that were available and sold in the US. Examples include the Bronco, Mustang, and 240SX.
[*][b]Imports:[/b] This list contains cars that were not available and sold in the US, but common in other countries. Examples are the R32 Skyline, Toyota Mark II, and Reliant Robin
[*][b]Rares and Exotics:[/b] This list contains cars that are either very expensive or produced in very low numbers. Examples are the GT40, Diablo, and Stratos. [/list]
Also note that the imports and exotics are both very rare in the base spawn lists, and the Spawn Selection sub-mods will not make them more common.

Additionally, the mod has been translated to German thanks to Eaglefire. Check out their German Project Zomboid community [url=https://discord.gg/project-zomboid-de]here![/url]

[h1]This mod pairs well with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2793164190] Vehicle Spawn Zones Expanded. (B42 Update pending)[/url][/h1]
Since the exotic and import cars are very rare, I started work on the spawn zones to give some specified areas for these cars to spawn, so there is a decent chance to find them on a save without it potentially becoming overwhelming. It eventually became more, adding a variety of new spawn areas beyond that. It works very well with this mod, and has many spawn lists for cars in this pack.

[h1]Also check out these complimentary MZ-themed mods![/h1] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2895585037][img]https://i.imgur.com/POZK84w.png[/img][/url] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2841969842][img]https://i.imgur.com/IrKA7bh.png[/img][/url] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2856740739][img]https://i.imgur.com/TixgJf8.png[/img][/url]

[h1]FAQ[/h1]

[b]Q: Multiplayer compatible?[/b]
A: [b][u]Yes![/u][/b] In general, all of my (and many of others') vehicles will be MP compatible unless stated otherwise.

[b]Q: Can this be used with other vehicle mods?[/b]
A: [b][u]Yes![/u][/b] It will work with other vehicle packs, and standalone vehicle mods. This mod was even made with use alongside mods like Filibuster Rhymes' Used Cars in mind, and has its spawn chances based around it. It doesn't alter anything vanilla either, so anything that changes vanilla vehicles will also work!

[b]Q: What are the vehicle IDs?[/b]
A: I've set up a post in the discussions with each vehicle ID and some small information about each car, check it out if you need the IDs.

[b]Q: How rare are the exotic/import cars?[/b]
A: They are [i]very[/i] rare, exotics in particular will be difficult to find on default (low) and normal car spawn rates. Exotics and imports will mostly only spawn near high-end houses, or anywhere else you can find the Cossette and Lang 4000 in vanilla, at a lower spawn rate. Some Easter Egg cars will spawn in similar areas to the Easter Egg cars from Used Cars. For some more specific hints, [spoiler]Riverside has a very large amount of possible spawn zones, and the bar across from the junkyard contains only sports car spawns, so that is the best place to look.[/spoiler]

[b]Q: Can this be added mid-save?[/b]
A: [b][u]Yes![/u][/b] Vehicles will only spawn in areas you have not explored yet however, so if you or your server have been all over the map, you may have trouble finding the vehicles. I'd recommend using [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2871002471]Udderly Vehicle Respawn[/url] if you want to use this on an existing save, it will allow new vehicles to spawn in explored areas the world.

[b]Q: I'm having issues joining/starting a server in MP (File mismatch, or connection lost after starting)[/b]
A: First, check AuthenticPeach's guide about these issues [url=https://theindiestone.com/forums/index.php?/topic/42925-how-to-fix-updated-mods-in-build-41-multiplayer/]here.[/url] For more info, check the first post of the "Bug reports" thread in discussions.

[b]Q: Can you make (x)?[/b]
A: If you're going to request a car, note that my main focus at the moment are cars that fit the game's time period (1993 and earlier). I do have cars outside of this timeframe on my list, but it may be a while before I get to them. I also already have quite a few on my list, so there's no guarantee I'll get to all of them.

[b]Q: What about animations?[/b]
A: Animations are planned to officially come to vanilla vehicles, so they are planned for this pack as well. While I will redo some cars before TIS' animations are officially available, they will be released as separate mods for the time being with options to replace the ones in the pack, due to some features not working with animated parts. I'm still going to add vehicles in the current vanilla style to the pack, better set up for the upcoming animations.

publishedfiledetails.title: [VFE] VANILLA FIREARMS EXPANSION (B41)
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]This upload will no longer be updated (I literally can't) but a B42 branch will happen when it's ready. I will keep this mod up for both B41 users and as a memorial. - Vilespring[/h1]

[h2]This mod replaces the models, textures and names of nearly all vanilla firearms, attachments, ammunition and magazines. It also adds several new lore-friendly weapons and items.[/h2]

[h1]⚠️ READ THE FAQ ⚠️[/h1]

As of this version, 23 new firearms (and their magazines), 6 attachments, and two new calibers of ammunition.

[h2]New Weapons[/h2]
SPAS-12 Shotgun - Rare semi-automatic shotgun with a folding stock and 7+1 magazine tube.

M590 Shotgun - Uncommon pump-action shotgun with a 7+1 magazine tube.

R1187 Shotgun - Uncommon semi-automatic shotgun with a 4+1 or 7+1 magazine tube.

MP5 Submachinegun - Rare select fire submachinegun using 30 round detachable magazines. Has a variant with folding stock and a built in flashlight.

MP5SD Submachinegun - Very rare suppressed select fire submachinegun using 30 round detachable magazines.

M10 Submachinegun - Very rare select fire machinegun using 32 round detachable magazines

Uzi Submachinegun - Very rare select fire machinegun using 32 round detachable magazines

Mini-14 Rifle - Uncommon semi-automatic rifle with 20 round detachable magazines. Has a folding stock variant.

W1866 Carbine - Common lever-action rifle with internal magazine of 8+1 rounds of .38 Special.

R92-44 Carbine - Common lever-action rifle with internal magazine of 8+1 rounds of .44 Magnum.

M2400 Combination Gun - Common break action rifle/shotgun. Chambered in .308 and Shotgun Shells.

AK-47 Assault Rifle - Very rare select fire assault rifle with 30 round detachable magazines. Has a folding stock variant.

MAK-90 Rifle - Uncommon semi-automatic rifle with 30 round detachable magazines. Basically a more common version of the AK-47.

FAL Battle Rifle - Very rare select fire rifle with 20 round detachable magazines.

CAR15 Assault Rifle - Very rare select fire assault rifle with 30 round detachable magazines.

TEC-9 Pistol - Uncommon semi-automatic pistol using 20 round detachable magazines.

G17 Pistol - Uncommon semi-automatic pistol using 17 round detachable magazines.

P229 Pistol - Uncommon semi-automatic pistol using 13 round detachable magazines.

CZ 75 Pistol - Uncommon semi-automatic pistol using 16 round detachable magazines.

Mk2 Pistol - Common semi-automatic pistol using 10 round detachable magazines. Has a rare integrally suppressed variant.

SKS Rifle - Uncommon semi-automatic rifle with 9+1 internal magazine. Has a variant with a built in bayonet.

R1022 Rifle - Common semi-automatic rifle using 10 round detachable magazines.

MC-45 Carbine - Common semi-automatic rifle using 7 round detachable magazines.

M24 Sniper Rifle - Very rare bolt-action rifle using a 5+1 internal magazine.

M60 Machinegun - Extremely rare automatic belt fed machinegun using 100 round belts. Requires ammunition with links and will drop the links while shooting.

M16 Masterkey Assault Rifle - Extremely rare select fire assault rifle with 30 round detachable magazines. Features an underbarrel shortened M590 shotgun with an internal tube magazine of 3 + 1.

M9 Bayonet - Uncommon knife. Can be mounted onto an M16 or M590 for use as a bayonet.

Entrenching Tool - Uncommon tool. Can be folded and used as either long blunt or an axe.


[h2]New Ammunition[/h2]
7.62 Ammunition - Used in AK47 and SKS Rifles.

.22 Ammunition - Used in R1022 rifle and Mk2 pistols.

Linked .308 Ammunition - .308 with the M13 Ammunition Link. Used in the M60 Machinegun.

[h2]New Attachments[/h2]
Bipod - Stabilizing bipod that can be attached to SKS, M14, R700, R788, and M24.

Shell Holder - Side mounted shotgun shell carrier to speed up shotgun reloads.

Shell Straps - Statistically the same as Shell Holder, but mounts on some weapons the Shell Holder cannot.

Lightened Stock - Statistically the same as the Fiberglass Stock but without the cosmetic changes.

Coupled magazines - Craftable taped assault rifle magazines to speed up reloads. (5.56 and 7.62)

Brass Catcher -  Cratable attachment for the M60 Machinegun that keeps links from dropping onto the ground.

This mod also rebalances weapon attachments in a manner that makes more sense compared to the vanilla game. (For example, you cannot mount a red dot sight on most handguns, excluding the DE Pistol, and the Magnum Revolver.)


[h2]Reworks to Jamming[/h2]
In vanilla when a weapon jams it consumes a round when it is unjammed. With VFE the round is returned if the gun is completely unloaded before clearing.

Jamming probability curve has been completely rewritten. In vanilla a 90% M16 only has a 50% chance of getting through a magazine without jamming. Now guns only begin to jam at 75% or 70%. They also start to jam more than vanilla guns do at 25% or 20%. Basically high condition guns jam less (or not at all) and low condition guns jam more often.

Manually cycled guns can jam now. Pump shotguns and bolt action rifles do their jam calculations when a round is chambered.

[h2]Zombies[/h2]
Many more zombies in the world can spawn with firearms on them. Survivor zombies have also been given a bit touch up.

[h2]Sandbox Options[/h2]
Quite a few aspects of the mod is configurable via sandbox settings. This is mostly toggles as to where VFE puts its guns, but also contains a multiplier for weapons in normal houses. An option exists to disable spawning of the M60 Machinegun, if such is desired.

This version of the mod is not final, we will continuously update adding new things and changing old ones.

[h2]FAQ[/h2]
Q: Is this mod compatible with Brita's/Arsenal26?
A: No. They are incompatible at the lua level. VFE is also designed around its own balance design, so using both at the same time doesn't make sense.

Q: I took an attachment off a weapon and it won't go back on.
A: You have a soft mod incompatibility. Another mod is overwriting attachments.

Q: A weapon doesn't accept an attachment that makes sense
A: Usually same story as previous question, but there is a chance it was missed. If its still true with just VFE in the modlist, report it. Also make sure you have a screwdriver in your inventory.

Q: Can this mod be installed mid save?
A: Yes and no. The new guns will spawn in unexplored locations, but guns already spawned will still retain their old stats, like damage and range. If you do decide to add it to an existing save you will have to delete and respawn all the guns you already have. The same is true with uninstalling. (when it comes to weapon stats)

Q: Does this mod have suppressors?
A: No. They're not off the table but they are also not a priority.

Q: Why are some guns invisible?
A: Maxwell's suppressor mod causes this when that mod is out of date. That is a problem with that mod, not VFE itself.

Q: Why are some guns tiger striped/rusted/wrong textures?
A: Issue with the texture optimization mod. Basically VFE changes textures for its models, but the texture optimization mod reverts them to vanilla.

[h2]Final Notes[/h2]

If you find any bugs, dislike something, or just have ideas you'd like to see incorporated into this mod, please let us know in the comments!

[h2]CREDITS[/h2]

Stendo_Clip - Models, Textures, Scripts, Lua
Spuchel - Textures, Icons, Scripts, Lua, Animations
Vilespring - Models, Textures, Scripts, Lua

Special thanks to TedEBear of Serious Survival Roleplay for sponsoring the M60 and several other firearms.
Special thanks to Alec for letting us use his magazine models from his mod, Ammo & Magazine icon MOD.
Special thanks to Great Hero J for creating various pixel art sprites that VFE uses as item/interface icons.

Workshop ID: 2667899942
Mod ID: VFExpansion1

publishedfiledetails.title: Addicted To Weight
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1][b]Since v1.16, sound notifications for weight changes are enabled by default. If you prefer not to receive notifications via beep sound, please adjust the settings in the options.[/b][/h1]
[img]https://imgur.com/XKBrRNF.png[/img]

[h1]Overview :[/h1]
Display weight information on digital watch panel.
[b][i]Confirmed to work with Build 41/42 and also work on MP.[/i][/b]

[h1]Features :[/h1]
[list]
[*]Displays the weight information as a number (integer part) and a gauge (first decimal place).
[*]Displays the weight Increase/Decrease status based on calorie intake.
[*]Displays the timezone information as DAY/NIGHT icons (switch at 6:00 and 18:00).
[*]Notifies with an sound alert when weight changes.
[/list]

[h1]Options :[/h1]
These options are available with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Mod Options[/url] in B41.
[list]
[*]Show Human Icon : Can specify whether to show or hide.
[*]Sound Notification Timing : You can change the timing for sound notifications.
[*]Sound Volume (Increase) : You can adjust the sound volume when the weight increases.
[*]Sound Volume (Decrease) : You can adjust the sound volume when the weight decreases.
[/list]

[h1]Known Issues :[/h1]
[list]
[*]Nothing at this time.
[/list]

[h1]Future plans :[/h1]
[list]
[*]Improvement display for "Clock display size : Small"
[*]Bug fix (if exists)
[/list]

[h1]Remarks :[/h1]
[list]
[*]You may add it to your mod pack without confirmation and credit. However, please use at your own risk, as I have not been able to verify that it works with SP.
[/list]

[h1]Release Notes :[/h1]
[list]
[*]v1.21 - Hotfix for Build 42.15.
[*]v1.20 - Improved Sound Effects.
[*]v1.19 - Supported options for Build 42.
[*]v1.18 - Compatible with Build 42.
[*]v1.17 - Added sound timing options.
Please refer to "Change Notes" for the older history.
[/list]

publishedfiledetails.title: Advanced Trajectory's Realistic Overhaul
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
This is a realistic overhaul of a mod called Advanced Trajectory. It tries to involve as much player skill as possible while having PZ's RPG mechanics such as moodles play a big role during gunplay.

[h3]If the mod is too easy or hard, nearly everything can be customized in the sandbox options.[/h3]

[b]If hosting a server, disable Anticheat 12 to prevent players from being kicked from no clipping from True Crawl/Crouch mod.[/b]

[b]If you are running into any errors, make sure you are not subscribed to any third party ATRO patches as they may be outdated.[/b]

[h1]B42.14 Update 2/17 + 2/21: Check change notes to see info about previous updates.[/h1]
[list]
[*] Fixed mod not working when playing 42.14
[*] Fixed revolversfx not being removed in MP
[/list]

[h1]Many changes and fixes to Advanced Trajectory. Watch the video for an overview of the core changes. A lot has changed so make sure to also read past change notes.[/h1]

[h3]Gunplay (keyword is bloom)[/h3]
At levels 3 to 10, the gunplay works similarly to Resident Evil 2 Remake meaning the player has to wait a bit for the character to "focus" and aim for their target before hitting an accurate shot. For example, when a player is aiming and standing still, bloom value will reduce from 100 to 30. Once the bloom reaches 30, it waits for a second or two before reducing to 0. A value below 5 (crosshair changes color) is what you want as it allows you to deal the most damage when aiming for the head, otherwise, it will be treated as body damage. So don't waste your ammo spraying bullets because you'll either miss or do little damage. Let's call this whole thing the "focus mechanic" for the sake of naming.

[h3]Higher level = higher accuracy and crit chance, less chance of missing[/h3]
[list]
[*] levels 0 to 2: very bad at shooting with anything but shotguns; player is limited to only dealing body and foot damage, but is not limited to dealing crit damage
[*] level 3: focus mechanic is unlocked which allows the player to get an accurate shot on a target from afar (can hit headshots)
[*] level 6+: bloom reduction rate is capped and no longer scales, however the crosshair will continue to get smaller the higher level you are
[*] level 10: player can run n gun and is a headshot machine (if stationary)
[/list]

[h3]Hit/Miss (Can be disabled)[/h3]
When the crosshair is slightly transparent at a certain bloom (which is dependent on aiming level), RNG will begin to play a role in determining whether or not the individual projectile will hit their target. Shotguns give a significant buff in increasing the bloom in which the RNG will be in effect.

[h3]Distance Penalty (Can be disabled)[/h3]
Crosshair will get bigger after a certain distance. The penalty is less severe the higher the aiming level and the longer the weapon range.

[h3]Moodles[/h3]
[list]
[*] [b]Has a Cold[/b]: sneezing adds a big burst of bloom whereas coughing adds a little
[*] [b]Drunk[/b]: more bloom is added when moving and turning
[*] [b]Endurance[/b]: aim sways a lot
[*] [b]Hyperthermia/Hypothermia[/b]: slows bloom rate reduction
[*] [b]Fatigue[/b]: slows bloom rate reduction drastically
[*] [b]Stress[/b]: limits the value of how small bloom can reduce to and makes crosshair shaky
[*] [b]Pain[/b]: slows bloom rate reduction, adds shaky visual effect to crosshair, and limits how small bloom can reduce to
[*] [b]Panic[/b]: increases effect of distance penalty and makes crosshair shaky
[*] [b]Heavy[/b]: Similar to drunkness, penalty when moving and turning is amplified. In addition, stamina consumption when switching stances is increased and more bloom will be added when switching between crouch and stand stance.
[/list]

[h3]Weapon Attachments[/h3]
If you deck out your weapon, you will have a much easier time shooting. It can even nullify negative effects at a certain level.
[list]
[*] AimingTime(+) => Increases bloom reduction
[*] HitChance(+)   => Shortens focus timer
[*] Recoil(-)           => Reduces recoil
[*] Range(+)          => Increases range
[/list]

[h3]True Crouch and True Crawl Support[/h3]
Not required, but a necessity for a full and funner experience.
[list]
[*] Switching stances will consume stamina based on fitness level and heavy moodle level. Switching stances between crouch and stand adds bloom while aiming.
[h3]Crouch[/h3]
[list]
[*] When performed, bloom is reduced for levels that have not unlocked the focus mechanic
[*] Bloom reduction rate is increased for all levels, helps a lot when exhausted
[*] Can burst a few bullets while ignoring the focus timer depending on the level and recoil
[*] Is OP when your gun is decked with attachments
[/list]
[h3]Crawl/Prone[/h3]
[list]
[*] you get effects from crouch but better and faster time to focus (less time waiting at minaimnum)
[*] recoil reduced by half
[/list]
[/list]

[h1]Suggested Mods [B41][/h1]
[h3]Alternative Crosshair for ammo counter near crosshair[/h3]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2814165668][img]https://i.imgur.com/VMisKHG.png[/img][/url]
To set it up, you'll need the "Mod Options" mod to make changes to the Alt. Crosshair. Go to your settings and locate Mod Options -> Alt. Crosshair, then set Ranged Weapon Crosshair to "IsoCursorFade" or "IsoCursorOpaque". After that, turn down the transparency of the vanilla isometric cursor in the main settings tab.
[img]https://i.imgur.com/WPheCdG.png[/img]

[h3]Brita's Bow Dupe Fix for ATRO (Brita users only)[/h3]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3132933898][img]https://i.imgur.com/8FF2EbF.png[/img][/url]
To get the bows to work properly, download the fix and have it loaded after Brita's Weapon Pack. Then go to sandbox options -> ATRO[DEBUG] and check debugEnableBow. That's all you need to do.

[h1]FAQ (MORE IN DISCUSSION SECTION) [/h1]
[b]Does this work with multiplayer?[/b]
Yes.

[b]Do I need the original Advanced Trajectory mod?[/b]
No, this mod is all you need.

[b]Does this work with existing saves and can I remove them mid save?[/b]
Yes and yes.

[b]Does this work with splitscreen or controller?[/b]
No.

[b]Does this work with other weapon mods?[/b]
Yes.

[b]Do I really need True Crouch and True Crawl [B41] or Lethal Stealth [B42]?[/b]
No, but it is RECOMMENDED for a full experience.

[b]I'm missing my shots on zombies with 0 bloom. Why?[/b]
The mod's crosshair is not always accurate. Sometimes, you must use the vanilla's isometric cursor. Make sure the base of the cursor is on their center of gravity.

[b]It takes too long for the bloom to get to 0, how do I make it faster?[/b]
You can go to the sandbox options and increase the value of "Focus Counter Speed".

[b]How do I get rid of the crosshair's low framerate?[/b]
Uncheck "UI Offscreen Rendering" in your settings.

[b]Does this work with Superb Survivors or any NPC mod?[/b]
Yes, enable "Ignore PVP Safety" in sandbox options so you can damage NPCs with guns.

[b]How to get rid of iso cursor?[/b]
Go to Sandbox options -> Advanced Trajectory (CROSSHAIR) -> set Iso Cursor [Transparency] to 0

[b]I'm seeing 2 bullets being shot at once. How do I fix this? [B42][/b]
One bullet is from ATRO and the other bullet is from vanilla. PLEASE LOCATE ATRO MOD FOLDER THEN GO TO "42\media\effects" and read the README file for instructions. Do not enable hide tracer option in sandbox.

[b]Credits: [/b]
[b]???? and ????[/b] for creating Advanced Trajectory
[b]Lisola[/b] for arrow and bolts and manual z aim code
[b]Bambino[/b] for insight and help on the PVP update
[b]dr fish / drfishetti[/b] for adding new bullet wounds
[b]inkredibehl  for french translation

publishedfiledetails.title: Another Players on Minimap
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1][b]This mod is made for the needs of [url=https://discord.gg/FhCd6VJFqb]KWRR Server[/url][/b][/h1]
[h3][b]KWRR Server is an South East Asia heavily modded server
Server IP is 104.234.167.83:16261[/b][/h3]
[hr][/hr]
[h1][b]Info[/b][/h1]
[quote]
In 41.73, the game added remote players visibility on world map. Oddly enough, that isn't added to the minimap which basically just a mini world map. This mod simply add that visibility to the minimap with just 2 additional lines of code.

As this simply make use of the feature already available on the world map, there is no performance impact as compared to old minimap mods. It is also the primary reason I look into the codes because old minimap mods are needlessly computing expensive and even network demanding to use in the big servers.
[/quote]
[h1][b]Incompatibility[/b][/h1]
[quote]
This mod override [i]ISMiniMap.InitPlayer(playerNum)[/i] thus is incompatible with any mod that override that. It is also highly recommended to load this mod at the top load order so it will be compatible to mods [url=https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Lua_(language)#Decoration]decorating[/url] the said function.
[/quote]

publishedfiledetails.title: Authentic Z
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1][b]Want a FUN and REALISTIC zombie outfit distribution mod? This mod is for you! [/b][/h1]

This mod adds a variety of zones into the game which gives zombies outfits to match their surroundings.
It also adds over 150 custom outfits which are appropriately placed on zombies in the world.


[h1][b] YES The mod is compatible with Build 42!  [/b][/h1]

Goals of this mod: [list]
 [*] Add the unused zombie outfits that the Indie Stone developers made
 [*] Add iconic George Romero-esque zombie outfits (Zombies hold items in their hands!)
 [*] Add appropriate setting and rarity for their clothing and items.
[/list]
[h2]Here are some of the main features of Authentic Z.[/h2]
 [list]
 [*]  Fat Zombies!
 [*]  Zombies with missing arms and hands!
 [*]  Backpack attachments. Upgrade your bags through 3 tiers to add more attachment slots!
 [*]  Adds a new custom costume shop in Louisville. You will find lots of fun clothing and accessories in there.
 [*]  The Crossroads Mall spawn zombies with random outfits = Random FUN!
 [*]  The March Ridge Dormitory is rezoned to have unique zombie placement within it.
 [*]  Ice Cream workers at each Ice Cream shop. Same thing with the new Donut Shops.
 [*]  Dedicated spawns for Hazmat zombies, Service Uniform zombies, and Ghillie Suit zombies at the Secret Base
 [*]  The large campgrounds, southwest from Riverside, are rezoned into Friday the 13th's Camp Crystal Lake. Find Jason, before he finds you! Includes other slashers like Michael Myers, Freddy Kreuger, and Leather Face!
 [*]  Student and Varsity zombies at schools have been fixed to only have realistic hairstyles.
 [*]  Fisherman and Poncho zombies alongside lakes and rivers (If zombies spawn there)
 [*]  Hunter Zombies chance at isolated cabins and hunting stands.
 [*]  Zombified Heroes from all your favorite zombie media
 [*]  Famous Zombies from the zombie genre
 [*]  Clown zombies�...Yes�...Clown Zombies
 [*] and a nice hit-list with checkboxes so you can log your progress! Great for late-game content!
 [/list]

[u] Supported Translations -  Always looking for more translators! Want to help? Contact me! [/u]  [list]
 [*] Chinese (Traditional and Simplified)
 [*] French
 [*] German
 [*] Polish
 [*] Portuguese (From Portugal and Brazil)
 [*] Russian
 [*] Spanish
 [/list]

[h2] Future Plans [/h2]
 [url=https://trello.com/b/PxLE94mh/authentic-z] [u] If you want to keep up to date with the current progress and future plans, check out the official Trello page for the mod! [/u]  [/url]

[img]https://i.imgur.com/5E15TyB.png[/img]
[b] AuthenticZLite ONLY has the outfits and zombie spawns. It does NOT have the backpack upgrading system.  [/b]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/Lj0GqNc.png[/img]
[b] AuthenticZBackpacks+ ONLY has the backpack upgrading system.  [/b]

[h3] Common Issues and their fixes [/h3]
1. "My server won't start" "Normal Termination" etc etc
[url=https://theindiestone.com/forums/index.php?/topic/42925-how-to-fix-updated-mods-in-build-41-multiplayer/] [b] FIX - Update your copy of AuthenticZ, sometimes Steam doesn't do it correctly. Review Method 2 on updating mods for servers/local servers  [/b][/url]

2.  "I can't upgrade my backpack or use the attachment slots" etc etc
[b] FIX - Make sure you are NOT running multiple branches of AuthenticZ, this is a common issue of doing that. Make sure you have the sufficient materials to upgrade. Secondary bags (small bags that you can not wear on your back) need a carabiner (can be crafted with 5 paperclips) so it can be attached to the "Secondary Bag Slot". [/b]

publishedfiledetails.title: Automatic Gate Motors
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h2][b]Automatic Gate Motors[/b][/h2]
Adds ways of remotely open and close gates that where built by a player.
[h3][i]New Update! - Version 1.1.6[/i][/h3]
To check out all the new features, take a look at the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3014820613]Changelog[/url]!
[b]If you have a server, be sure that [i]BackupOnStart=true[/i] on server settings (or have a backup) to avoid issues![/b]

[hr][/hr]
[h2][b]Features:[/b][/h2]
Adds 3 new items: Automatic Gate Controller, Automatic Gate Motor and a new magazine: (see [i]How to use it?[/i])
[list]
[*] The Automatic Gate Motor can be crafted and installed on any gate that can be built by the player, turning it into a Automatic Gate.
(Can't be installed on garage doors or gates that already exists and can't be build by the player)
[*] The Automatic Gate Controller can be connected to a Automatic Gate to interact with it.
[*] The new magazine is called "All about Automatic Gates" and enables the player to craft all the above mentioned items.
[/list]
Apart from new content, there also a few features to help with player interactions and enables the Mod to be more flexible
[list]
[*] There are feedbacks to the player in almost every action related to the Mod.
[*] The tooltips are very self-explanatory to help the player figure out things.
[*] The Mod is completely translate-able (See pinned discussion for [i][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3014820613/3803904729133209748/]Translations[/url][/i]).
[*] A lot of things can be changed via the [i]Sandbox Settings[/i], including skill level requirements for crafting and other settings.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]
[h2][b]How to use it?[/b][/h2]
[olist]
[*] Find the magazine "All about Automatic Gates" to learn the recipes and how to install the motor.
[*] Craft a Automatic Gate Motor and a Automatic Gate Controller
[*] Install the Motor on a gate using a Propane Torch and Welding Rods (option only shows if you read the magazine and have a Propane Torch and a Welder Mask)
[*] You can connect the Controller to the Automatic Gate to use it
[/olist]
[list]
[*] To open/close, the gate needs any car battery inside it's new container (corner part)
[*] The gate can be locked/unlocked (automatically/manually) using a Controller (automation part can be changed via [i]Sandbox Settings[/i])
[*] The gate can be renamed. Controllers will have the current name of the gate, and will update automatically on change.
[*] The Controller have a maximum range to work (can be changed via [i]Sandbox Settings[/i])
[*] The Controller can be attached and used on the Belt (On a Gamepad, use the Left-DPad RadialMenu)
[*] You can Double-Click on the Controller to use it
[/list]
This should be everything you need to know to use get around how to use the mod.
If you want to know more and don't care about spoilers, I recommend you read the full [i][url=https://pastebin.com/hkmKRrBC]List of Features[/url][/i]

[h3][b]BE CAREFUL![/b][/h3]
If the gate is locked, you cannot connect another controller directly to it.
So, if you have no controllers connected to a gate, and it is locked, the only solution is to [b][i]DESTROY[/i][/b] the gate and build a new one.
This is done for security reasons (MP). If you have a idea on how to do it better, see pinned discussion [i][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3014820613/3803904729133220657/]Suggestions[/url][/i].

[hr][/hr]
[h2][b]Questions:[/b][/h2]
[h3]Is it compatible with Multiplayer?[/h3]
Yes! All the testing was done using the "Host" option, and all features are working without problems.
[h3]Does it work on existing saves?[/h3]
Yes! It can be enabled mid-save without any problems.
You will just need to explore new areas to get the Magazine, or (spoiler):
[spoiler]Create a new survivor with the Engineer profession (already existing engineers will not know the recipes)[/spoiler]
(If you already have motors installed there may be problems with disabling)
[h3]Does it work for all game versions?[/h3]
Only tested on current game version: 41.78.16
[h3]What mods it is incompatible?[/h3]
Currently, the only incompatible mod know is [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3209239259]Sensors and Traps[/url].

[hr][/hr]

[h2][b]Planned Features:[/b][/h2]
[list]

[*] [strike]Renaming Gates[/strike] - Added on v1.1.0, compatible with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2880687295]Rename Containers[/url]

[/list]

[h2][b]Found any bugs?[/b][/h2]
This is actually my first Lua mod, expect things to (sometimes) not work properly.
If you encounter any errors or bugs, report them according to the first post in the pinned discussion [i][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3014820613/3803904729133227446/]Bug Reports[/url][/i].
For any questions, please be kind and leave a comment below!

[h2][b]Credits:[/b][/h2]
The idea of making this mod came from [i][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2735447453]this[/url][/i].
My mod was made from scratch, but was that mod that got me all the inspiration to make my own, and credits should be given ;)
I would also like to thank everyone in #mod_development on the official [url=https://discord.gg/theindiestone]Project Zomboid Discord[/url] (especially @albion =D)

[h1]Autotsar Trailers Inc. - the best trailers in Kentucky![/h1]

Do you work on a construction site and your tool no longer fits into the car?
Tired of running to the store every week, want to stock up on the full?
Or maybe you want to take out all the corpses from neighboring houses to the forest?

You will be saved by the trailer [i][b]"Autotsar GovNoVoz-250" (GNV-250)[/b][/i]:

Is this not enough for you?
Are you moving? Need to transport furniture? Or are there a lot of your neighbors?
Especially for you! Trailer [i][b]"Autotsar GovNoVoz-500" (GNV-500)[/b][/i]:
[list]

Now your favorite fuel will always be with you.

2020.12.20 New arrival ...

We are glad to present a new model of the Autotsar Trailers Inc.: the mobile generator [i][b]"GENA-220"[/b][/i].
It's time to say "No!" darkness.

The advantage of our generator:
[list]

Hurry up to buy before the New Year! Delight yourself and your neighbors by lighting up your entire neighborhood.

Additionally, we would like to inform you that now you can take part in the development of Avtotsar trailers. We invite you to our public workshop: https://github.com/ibrrus/autotsar

publishedfiledetails.title: Become Brave
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
B42 - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3388028737

[code]
[h1]Disclaimer and FAQs[/h1]
[list]
[*]Mod is still in active development, so expect updates.
[*]Mod is tested in Singleplayer, Coop and Dedicated Server environments with multiple people. It works.
[*]Updates will be deployed on Mondays so it won't ruin anyone's weekend.
[*]Please use the respective discussions for posting bugs and suggestions.
[/list]
[h2]Do you want to contribute? Take a look at the discussions and post your translations in the appropriate discussions! It's much appreciated.[/h2]
[/code]

[h2] Compatible Mods [/h2]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2627877543]Become Desensitized[/url]

[h2]Important Changes[/h2]
Removed Mod Options. Mod values can be configured in the sandbox options. I believe this approach is more balanced and fair. (See screenshot)
Because of this change, existing saves will revert to using default values (Min: 350, Max: 1500, Consider Traits: true, Consider Occupations: true). This is the only way to make saves backwards compatible.

[h1]Exhausted from your character always panicking when they see a zombie even though they slaughtered countless zombies? Then this mod is for you.[/h1]

[h1]What It Does[/h1]
[olist]
[*]After you kill 350 (Modifiable through Sandbox Options) zombies through melee or gun combat (no fire burns), you get the chance to become brave. This chance increases as you get more zombie kills.
[*]If you reach 1500 (Modifiable through Sandbox Options) zombie kills, you automatically become brave.
[*]Some traits and professions also change the chance that you'll become brave.
[*][b]You have a chance to gain this trait at midnight (00:00).[/b]
[/olist]
[h1]Considered Traits that change the chance of gaining the trait[/h1]
Postive: Hunter
Negative: Cowardly, Agoraphobic, Claustrophobic, Hemophobic, Pacifist

[h1]Considered Occupations that change the chance of gaining the trait[/h1]
Police Officer, Fireman, Park Ranger, Security Guard, Doctor, Nurse

[h1]Frequent Answers[/h1]
This mod should work with existing saves.

[h1]Possible Improvements[/h1]
Any suggestions, let me know and I'll think about it.

[h1]Check out my other mods[/h1]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2843298732]Start Scenario - Vehicle Nomad Mod Collection[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2846989295]Silent Hill Radio REDUX[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2712620992]Permafrost[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2627877543]Become Desensitized[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2809204984]Become Brave[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2434339338]Kingsmouth in KY[/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2461163224]Slocan Lake REDUX[/url]

[h1]I do mod commissions - Discord: _mon.key[/h1]

[url=https://ko-fi.com/pzmonkey] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TrifectaKS/MonkeyWorkshopAds/main/buymeacoffee.png[/img] [/url]

Workshop ID: 2809204984
Mod ID: BecomeBrave

publishedfiledetails.file_description:

[code]
[h1]Disclaimer and FAQs[/h1]
[list]
[*]Mod is still in active development, so expect updates.
[*]Mod is tested in Singleplayer, Coop and Dedicated Server environments with multiple people. It works.

[/list]

[/code]

[h2] Compatible Mods [/h2]

[h2]Important Changes[/h2]
Removed Mod Options. Mod values can be configured in the sandbox options. I believe this approach is more balanced and fair. (See screenshot)
Because of this change, existing saves will revert to using default values (Min: 500, Max: 2000, Consider Traits: true, Consider Occupations: true). This is the only way to make saves backwards compatible.

[h1]Exhausted from your character always panicking when they see a zombie even though they slaughtered countless zombies? Then this mod is for you.[/h1]

[h1]What It Does[/h1]
[olist]
[*]After you kill 500 (Modifiable through Sandbox Options) zombies through melee or gun combat (no fire burns), you get the chance to become desensitized. This chance increases as you get more zombie kills.
[*]If you reach 2000 (Modifiable through Sandbox Options) zombie kills, you automatically become desensitized.
[*]Some traits and professions also change the chance that you'll become desensitized.
[*]When you become desensitized, mutually exclusive traits will be removed (Cowardly, Agoraphobic, Claustrophobic, Hemophobic).
[*][b]You have a chance to gain this trait at midnight (00:00).[/b]
[/olist]

[h1]Considered Traits that change the chance of gaining the trait[/h1]
Postive: Brave, Hunter
Negative: Cowardly, Agoraphobic, Claustrophobic, Hemophobic, Pacifist

[h1]Considered Occupations that change the chance of gaining the trait[/h1]
Police Officer, Fireman, Park Ranger, Security Guard, Doctor, Nurse

publishedfiledetails.title: Beds Have Blankets
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b] Working for B41 and B42[/b]

[b] updated to 42.13 [b]

[hr][/hr]
[h3]Beds with blanket spawns[/h3]
An option to make beds with blankets spawn throughout the world, this can be enabled mid game but will only apply to new beds when loading a new area.

When you explore new areas regular beds have a chance to either spawn a blanket item, be changed with blanket covered bed or do nothing. You need the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2969455858](mod) Target Square: On Load Commands[/url] in order for the beds to be properly transformed which is why only items will be spawned in it's absense. Until the 20th of September, previously loaded areas will spawn the blanket item too.

[hr][/hr]
I plan to update this periodically with more blanket colors and designs

The original version of this mod will remain as an option if you desire to keep things simple

[h3] Special Thanks [/h3]

This mod was only possible with the help of  Poltergeist, they wrote most of the code and have many other mods you should check out
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2987322213] polt's haunted mod list [/url]


[url=https://github.com/gunslinger564/pzblankets] Github Repo [/url]

publishedfiledetails.title: Better Masks

[h2][b]New Update (05-28-2022 GMT):[/b][/h2]
- Added new face masks and respirators.
- The rarity of the mask has been changed to be more realistic. Now, finding masks is more difficult than ever before, but you can still find many medical masks in hospitals and pharmacies.
- Improved 3d models of some items.
- Updated icons for mask boxes.
- Added icons for empty mask boxes.
- Added WorldStaticModel to all items.
- Added ZombiesZoneDefinition. Zombies now occasionally spawn with a facemask or respirator equipped.
- Translations updated for new updates.
- A mod has been added that increases the spawn rate of masks by about 2x.
- Added compatibility patch for "Working Masks" mod.

publishedfiledetails.title: Better Towing (Work in SP/MP 41.71+)
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Initially, this mod added its own towing physics with a rope and a rigid hitch. But the developers liked this mod and they added the towing option to the game!
([url=https://projectzomboid.com/blog/news/2020/11/lag-fightin/] link to development blog [/url])

Mod expands and improves towing, which is added to the game.
[b] Supported version: 41.x [/b]
[hr] [/hr]
[h1] More details: [/h1]
[h3] Support for mods that add new cars [/h3]
All mods that are added cars, but which have not been updated to support trailers, will work with trailers!

[h3] Added "Tow bar" item and the ability to tow a car like a trailer [/h3]
Now you can tow a car and stay with unbroken trunk!
** Towing with a rope is possible without an item (like every car have tow rope)

[h3] Special towing vehicle [/h3]
Added support for tow truck. The tow truck can attach a car to a hook. It is also easier to use a tow truckto remove burnt-out cars from the road.
And you can flip upright the car!

!The mod does not add a tow truck to the game!
Here's an example of a mod that adds a tow truck to the game:
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2292487242] Tow Truck - Chevalier Rhino [/url]
[img] https://i.ibb.co/1vffY5X/Screenshot-2.png [/img]
[img] https://i.ibb.co/fCngxZz/fkt-Bo-R124g.gif [/img]

[h3] Improved interface [/h3]
Added icons for different types of cars and different types of towing. Added multilevel selection menu. The menu sees several cars at once and you can select the type of hook.
Icon Author: harrycheez ([url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/Harrycheez] Steam Profile [/url])

[h3] The ability to push the car with your hands  [/h3]
Now you can move a car that is stuck due to a bug or for another reason
[img] https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1645468949334152674/8EEAAF1F7A44E1090F7AD6A0E55638260D8160D6/ [/img]

[hr] [/hr]
[h2] Mods that complement this mod well: [/h2]
[b] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2292487242] Tow Truck - Chevalier Rhino [/url] [/b]
Special towing vehicle
[img] https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1653346591336489652/B2BD1A59E78FA20D1EF687A6622C2B8449E7502A/ [/img]
[b] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2282429356] Autotsar Trailers [/url] [/b]
New types of trailers: RV home, tanker, different trailers
[img] https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1673611904718660215/7A31C8457ADF01A1F679CD85A0B4DD2785975722/ [/img]
[b] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1539281445&searchtext=crashed] Crashed cars [/url] [/b]
Adds a large number of damaged cars
[img]https://i.ibb.co/64662Zy/Screenshot-6.png[/img]
[hr] [/hr]
[h2] Incompatible mods: [/h2]
[b] Let me think [/b]
[b] Harder Hotwire [/b]

[hr] [/hr]
[h2] Instruction [/h2]
When cars are near - open the radial menu (V key) and select to attach the car.
An object is required for towing with a tow bar. A tow bar attaches to the front of one vehicle and the rear of another.

publishedfiledetails.title: Boredom Tweaks
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Something I found when playing Zomboid was that the Boredom moodle was always a bit frustrating to manage. The way it functions in vanilla, any time you are indoors you are slowly gaining boredom, and it is slightly slower while reading. If you are in multiplayer and speak in chat, this lowers it, along with handling for when NPCs are in the game you will lose boredom if you are around them. You also will gain boredom if you sit in a vehicle and are not moving, but lose it when you are moving. Finally, you lose boredom if you are not a structure, and if you are panicked (anything greater then 5 for the panic levels) it immediately just sets your boredom to 0.

A recent update has added proper boredom to player-built structures! I'm hoping my bug report helped this. With Boredom Tweaks, the boredom is a good bit more manageable.

If you are in any building, this is how boredom will work:

- While doing nothing, you are slowly gaining boredom
- If you are reading, this slows that gain down
- If you do any Timed Action, you will lose boredom instead! This includes things like storing/retrieving items, working out, or preparing food. The only exception is reading - as I wished to keep things similar to vanilla. But anything that puts the timed progress bar above your head is generally a Timed Action! If you are currently doing something, I don't think you'd be bored, especially in a survival scenario!
- If you are playing in multiplayer, and you are within five squares of another player, you will lose boredom! If someone is that close, you are probably hanging out and friends, or they are hostile and you probably will find it hard to be bored then!
- The vanilla checks for speaking in chat as well as NPCs being around you are also preserved, and you will lose boredom if you do them as well! This should mean that once the future updates come out, it will be compatible - hopefully!
- If you are in a vehicle, these same conditions also apply now as well!
- Finally, if you are outdoors, you will constantly be losing boredom, and when you are panicked, you are still entirely unable to be bored.

The biggest change I added with this mod: any time that you are losing boredom and you are practically at empty boredom levels (less then 5 while looking at the debug values), as long as you do not see the sadness moodle showing on the screen (less then 25), you will become happier slowly. If you are sad enough that it does show (greater then 25), then you will have to resort to other methods to get happier again. This has the effect of making it a bit easier to manage your boredom and mood together if you are being active, but if you go around doing things that will make you bored and sad, you still will have to manage that with other methods. Books and Comics are still important! These are personal little tweaks I found that makes it more enjoyable, and sensible too.

This is my first mod for Zomboid, so please let me know of any issues! And I hope that you enjoy it as well!

While it will always be free to enjoy no matter what, if you are willing and able to give a little, it is immensely appreciated! https://paypal.me/JonRMods

Workshop ID: 2725360009
Mod ID: BoredomTweaks

publishedfiledetails.title: Braven's Bicycles Redux
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]The Bicycle Revolution Returns![/h1]
I always found it a bit odd that PZ didn't have any working bicycles, so I decided to do it myself. Goodbye pollution. Goodbye beaten up cars without gas or keys. Hello freedom!
This mod introduces bicycles to the game. Bicycles are somewhat difficult to find though, so watch out for it!


[b]Obs:[/b] This mod is returning after a long time. I no longer have access to the old bug reports or feedback. Please post any issues you encounter or suggestions you might have!

[h1]Advantages:[/h1]
[list]
    [*]Doesn't require gas or power, you are the engine!
    [*]Makes very little noise, ideal for stealth!
    [*]Highly customizable!
    [*]Since it's a bicycle you don't need keys, just hop in!
[/list]

[h1]Disadvantages:[/h1]
[list]
    [*]The more you pedal the more tired you get!
    [*]You are very vulnerable to attacks!
    [*]Low storage capacity!
    [*]Relatively low top speed!
[/list]

[h1]How does it work?[/h1]
The bicycle is a vehicle that can offer immense advantages, with some costs, of course.
The bicycle works just like in real life. Pedalling tires you but also gives you fitness exp.
Don't pedal to full exhaustion or you will fall off!

The faster you go, the faster you tire.
Pedalling also warms you up if you are cold, and you can pick up the bicycle and transport it.
There are various types of bicycle, and they each have their own exclusive differentials.

[h1][b]F.A.Q[/b][/h1]

[h1]Does it work in Multiplayer?[/h1]
Of course it does!

[h1]Does it work on existing saves?[/h1]
Yes! But bicycles won't spawn on already explored areas.

[h1]What does this mod offer?[/h1]
Please click [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2988491347/3812906855259848876/]here[/url] to check it out.

[h1]Is the mod compatible with [...]?[/h1]
Please click [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2988491347/3812906855259854190/]here[/url] for a list of known incompatible mods.
Everything else should work perfectly.

[h1]How do I transport the bicycle?[/h1]
To pick up a bicycle, right click it or use the Vehicle radial menu.
To place a bicycle, simply drop its frame on the ground.

[h1][b]Credits[/b][/h1]
Powered by [b]BitBraven[/b].
Model adjustments and animations by [b]MonkeyShark[/b].
And of course, thank [b]you[/b] for supporting me!

[h1]Like my mods?[/h1]
Join me on Discord and maybe on Patreon if you feel like it!
I also accept Ko-Fi donations. All money is used on mod development.

publishedfiledetails.title: Braven's Camouflage
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Zombie Camouflage[/h1]
We've seen it in The Walking Dead, we've seen it in Dying Light, it just... makes sense. So why is it not in PZ? Well, now it is! Grab your machette, kill a zombie and start uh... dressing!

[h1]How does it work?[/h1]
Simply right click a corpse and select "Use camouflage". Your character will then take some time to do it, but once its done you will be protected.

After applying camouflage, your character will confuse zombies for a set amount of time (Default is 60 in-game minutes). However, your character will be slightly tired from doing it, as well as (Optionally) queasy, as anybody would be. Needless to say your character will also be all bloodied.

Zombies that spot a camouflaged player will be confused, but [b]NOT[/b] completely fooled! They will still suspect the player, and there is a small chance they will follow them. However, zombies will [b]NOT[/b] actively attack a Player, even if the zombies charge towards them. They are merely confused. If the Player gets too close to a zombie, the zombie will finally distinguish the Player and [b]NOW[/b] will attack them, so stay away!

[h1][b]F.A.Q[/b][/h1]

[h1]Does it work in Multiplayer?[/h1]
Of course it does!

[h1]Does it work on existing saves?[/h1]
Absolutely!

[h1]Is the mod compatible with [...]?[/h1]
This mod shouldn't have any incompatibility with other mods, but if it does, let me know.

[h1]Do I retain camouflage if I [...]?[/h1]
You will lose your camouflage if you leave the game, or enough time passes. Removing all your blood will also remove your camouflage.

[h1][b]Credits[/b][/h1]
Powered by [b]BitBraven[/b].
And of course, thank [b]you[/b] for supporting me!

[img]https://media1.giphy.com/media/wRhSi68hscY8xNOlXS/giphy.gif[/img]

[h1]Like my mods?[/h1]

publishedfiledetails.title: Braven's Utilities
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[img]https://i.ibb.co/bmLb7pQ/Banner-Features.png[/img]

[h1]A set of tools[/h1]
This simple "mod" adds basic functionality I tend to use in my [i]actual[/i] mods.

publishedfiledetails.title: Build 42+ UNSUPPORTED - Item Tweaker API
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Workshop ID: 566115016
ModID: ItemTweakerAPI

--EDIT 3  - End of Support --
I thank you all who have subscribed, and with these numbers am humbled. 
I am aware this mod no longer works for build 42. I am okay with this, and in fact am glad, as this mod was honestly never really needed. It has been 9 years, and was once drastically needed to help spread modding awareness, this is by far no longer true. 
It is time to return the attention this mod has been given back to the Zomboid devs, who laid the framework this mod piggybacked.

For Context: 
This mod was built during a time where new Zomboid modders would release mods containing entire files worth of item definitions, in order to only change a single entry, thus removing any changes a mod loaded previously would make.

This mod mod makes use of code that Zomboid always had simply to make new modders know how to make mods more compatible. I honestly never intended for people to continue to use this mod for their mods for the last 9 years instead of discovering the real method behind how to do it themselves. 

That being said, while I appreciate the support, and the sheer number of people subscribing, I am going to keep this mod in a mothballed state, ending support for build 42 onward, but keeping it available to any mod still relying on it in build 41. Feel free to unsubscribe when the time for it comes, but it's still been quite a trip.

--EDIT 2--
For those of you who are -still- getting missing file errors, Unsubscribe from the other item tweaker here.
https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2510747487

Having both versions subscribed list alone can cause issues, as they are using the same ModID, and is 100% confusing your game's mod enabling/loading attempts.

This alone is making it try to load both my still working code, and the outdated version's now broken code.

Furthermore, if this issue is still happening, and you know you haven't subscribed to this mod, then there may be another mod you've subscribed to that is still using the outdated mod's script files.

I recommend looking into which those are, and suggest those mods switch back to this still working version.

 ---EDIT---
It's come to my attention that there is another version of item tweaker that had been updated at one point. While it may have been an improvement at one point, and I thank him for trying to keep this mod alive, his version is apparently causing many issues in the new build. This version seems to still work very well.

I have not been modding for PZ in quite a long time, however knowing this mod still works now as it did before makes me feel glad to have been part of the modding community. Should this start acting up for real, I may pass it on to someone more active, but as of now, I hope you continue to enjoy it. Thank you again Brybry and Blindcoder for helping to make improved mod compatability possible all these years



---ORIGINAL POST---

This modding API allows any modders to more simply make multiple changes to any items loaded into the game's current database, while leaving the rest of the remaining values alone. This uses code that Zomboid already has implemented, but intended for new modders that haven't discovered those commands yet.

Change any item's weight, display name, display category, hunger reduction, or anything else, while keeping the item as mod friendly as possible. 
(WARNING: changing TYPE will delete all instances of already spawned items) 

You can change only an item icon, while another mod changes the same item's weight, all without conflict (Unless mods do not use this mod to do so, or two mods try to change the same value, in which case, the last loaded mod will win) 

For the Simplest Implementation through LUA: 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------Begin File 
if getActivatedMods():contains("ItemTweakerAPI") then 
require("ItemTweaker_Core"); 
else return end 

TweakItem("Base.Needle","Icon", "Worm");
TweakItem("Base.Needle","Tooltip", "Wearable: Waist");
TweakItem("Base.Needle","DisplayCategory", "Repair");
-----------------------------------------------------------------------End File 
For each item and property you wish to change, create a new line, and place the related values in place. 

You can even add custom ModData to items.
TweakItem("Base.Needle","BaseValue", "500");

Organized Item Names is an example mod to hopefully show beginner modders how to make use of this API

Mods I know of using this API: 
[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=502286003] Custom Categories[/url] 
[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=714554934] JPCategoriesPlus[/url]  - By: Proxyer
[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=498547445] Littering[/url]  - By: Svarog
[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=699161589] Jaw Stab Proliferation[/url]  - By: LoonyLadel

[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1148522195] Wedge's Item Name Fixes[/url]  - By: Wedge McCloud (Includes changes for some other mods)
[strike][url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=502286003] Custom Categories[/url][/strike](Outdated: Use Wedge's Item Name Fixes instead)
[strike][url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=569235671] Organized Item Names[/url][/strike] (Outdated: Use Wedge's Item Name Fixes instead)

[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1165204481] Wedge's Hydrocraft Tweaks[/url]  - By: Wedge McCloud (Requires Hydrocraft)
[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1273960779] Better Carts[/url]  - By: yuriy206 (Requires Hydrocraft)

Weight when full  =  0.7 
Capacity  =  16
Also has capacity for 2 units of gasoline
Metallic[/i]
