publishedfiledetails.title: Research Facility, KY [B41]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
The Research Facility, KY is a full expansion and redesign of the secret military base that can be found to the west of Rosewood, KY. It's design is inspired by the sprawling complex of Black Mesa from the Half-Life series, as well as from the town of Eureka from the TV show Eureka (2006).

[img] https://i.imgur.com/EEVrGqY.gif [/img]

The facility conducts advanced research in the areas of high tech aerospace engineering, plant sciences and advanced biomedical research. The facility contains a several large research facilities, a satellite launch facility, a small heliport, a military outpost and a company town to house the employees of the facility.

[h1]Gameplay[/h1]
The entire facility is surrounded by double wide, unclimbable military grade fence, and at the time of gamestart the facility has been placed on a full lockdown. This means it will be impossible to get past the main gate with a car until you [b] have a sledgehammer [/b] (you can still climb the front gate). The zombie population are very high within the facility, but there are many valuable looting areas and many army vehicle spawns making it a much more attractive late-game looting spot compared to its vanilla counterpart.

[b] "The Biomedical & Engineering Facilities are on full lockdown with shutters blocking off all entrance and exits, if the system worked the infection will be contained" (hint: there are ways in/out without a sledge) [/b]

You can spawn within the base, but the spawns are VERY high so it will be a very tough start in terms of numbers if playing on normal or above.

[b]An optional addon is included that connects the Research Facility to Rosewood via a proper main road (see worldmap image for cells)[/b]

[h1]Compatability[/h1]
The map uses the cells 18,41 / 18,42 & 19,41 / 19,42.

Works well with...
[list]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1516836158] Fort Redstone 2.0 [/url] - This mod was specifically designed to support the new incarnation of Fort Redstone, and does not overlap any of its cells at time of writing.
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2196102849] Raven Creek [/url]  - [b]LOAD Raven Creek AFTER THIS MOD![/b] Tested with this mod and works fine (they come up right against each other but dont overlap)
[/list]
Incompatible with...
[list]
[*] Slocan Lake (Sort of works, you must put Slocan Lake (and Raven Creek etc) AFTER Research Facility.
[*] Rosewood Access Road (breaks half the map) and is not needed (This map contains its own access road).
[/list]
[h1]Multiplayer / Server [/h1]
Make sure you go into the server settings, map, and then add this map to the list and move it up to the top of the list to ensure it prioritizes generating the new area rather than the base map (not sure why its an issue within this map). 


[h1]Special Thanks[/h1]
DaddyDirk for his tile mod, and his excellent YouTube series that taught me how to map!


[h1]Dev News / Update[/h1]
- April, 2026
Hi all, updated on this map. While i would love to and have ideas for a B42 version, sadly between work, life and others projects I just dont have time to port the map right now. I cant guarantee the map will ever be ported by me.

Any modders/map makers who wish to port it to B42 are more than welcome to, im happy for you to publish it yourself with attribution or I can add you to the modpage here and pending quick review can be updated here.  

Workshop ID: 2807152393
Mod ID: rbr
Mod ID: rbrA2
Mod ID: rbrA
Map Folder: researchbase
Map Folder: researchbaseroad
Map Folder: rbr_road

publishedfiledetails.title: RnR Mycology
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]What is this then?[/h1]
RnR Mycology is (going to be) a deep dive into mushroom foraging and cultivation. Yes, it's a very niche mod for a very niche interest, and it's very much WIP right now.

[h1]Support[/h1]
Please @ huey0404 on the PZ Modding Community Discord or use the comments or bug thread on Steam. I generally ignore random DMs.

[h1]Contributors[/h1]
[list]
[*] @huey - all the things
[*] @Burnzoire - tooling, code and code review
[*] @Psycho - balancing and art
[/list]

[h1]Features[/h1]
[b]Current:[/b]
[list]
[*] A wide range of gourmet, poison, medicinal and active mushrooms to find with the vanilla foraging system
[*] Recognisable icons for each species
[*] A skill-based identification system
[*] Can be cooked in many vanilla recipes, cooked alone or eaten raw
[*] Can be composted when rotten
[*] Lootable Mycology skillbooks
[*] Forageable at most times of the year except midsummer and midwinter
[*] More commonly found after rain, in spring and autumn
[*] Balanced and tested in multiplayer
[*] Should seamlessly slide into an existing save/server
[/list]
[b]Planned:[/b]
[list]
[*] Additional gourmet, medicinal, poisonous and active mushrooms, and truffles!
[*] Recognisable 3d models and textures for each genus and species
[*] New recipes
[*] A detailed cultivation system with skill-based progression through cultivation teks
[*] Growing mycelium from spores and fruit clones on agar plates (lootable and craftable)
[*] Autoclaving, pasteurisation and sterile lab work
[*] Grow tents and lights
[*] Humidity and temperature management
[*] The supplies you need to maintain your culture library and grow your mushrooms
[*] Preparation of medicinal tinctures and MDs
[*] An extremely rare and difficult to craft single-dose Knox Infection antidote (endgame bite insurance) - optional
[*] Medicinal effects
[*] Psychedelic effects (trip balls!) Remember set and setting, as a bad trip in the apocalypse could be fatal...
[*] Isolation of Penicillium fungus for antibiotics
[*] Badger and snake plushies for fellow fans of 2008 memes
[/list]

[h1]Known Issues[/h1]
[list]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ninchistudios/rnr-mycology/issues/5]The 3x XP bonus from reading Mycology 1 may persist when you hit Mycology Level 3[/url], and so on at higher levels. Or it might be an artifact of changing skills as admin. Needs live testing.
[/list]

[h1]Release Notes[/h1]
[b]2023.4[/b]
[list]
[*] Removes vanilla mushrooms from the foraging tables. If you can't find any mushrooms after starting a new save in midsummer... they don't appear in midsummer! Watch Life and Living!
[*] Fixes the erroneous tooltip on Mycology skillbooks.
[*] Fixes the transparency on icons.
[*] Adds initial Spanish translation - gracias @Vasher
[*] Adds a small stress debuff to unidentified mushrooms. As the saying goes: pick one for you and one for the coroner.
[*] Adds item translations for future i18n support.
[/list]

To view previous Release Notes, check the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3111324765]Change Notes[/url] section.

Workshop ID: 3111324765
Mod ID: RnRMycology

publishedfiledetails.title: Rosewood Expansion
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
UPDATED:
- Minimap! It should be working now, fully regenerated and updated (need to start new game)
- Updated core tileset - should resolve at least some of the red question marks issues
- Significantly decreased weapon spawns by removing military lockers in tents (was: 7-8 lockers, now 1-2 lockers)
- New building: "Beers" Bar & Restaurant

ABOUT:
This mod adds an expansion to northern part of Rosewood as well as a Zoo. Plot twist is that Zoo was closed early during the pandemic, and later was used as an evac center.

FEATURES:
- The expansion occupies 4 cells north of Rosewood, exact coordinates at map screenshot.
- Map implements 3 custom tilesets (which are required) so there will be plenty of new stuff to see.
- Map implements new minimap features.
- Properly zoned for foraging and zombie spawns.
- This map removes a gas station in north Rosewood - there is a replacements gas station almost at the same location, just a little bith to east.

I have removed the buildings list as it would be too long. I have both created my buildings as well as downloaded some from repository v2, huuuuge thanks to anyone who shared their builds there!

There are few prominent locations worth noting:
- American footbal field and premises
- Dirkea with tons of furniture
- Church with graveyard (because of course there is)
- Hobo town with scrapyard
- Supa secret bunker
- Mini mall

As well as countless shops, cafes, residential houses and more...

Compatible with:
- Pitstop
- Blackwood
- Grapeseed
- Lake Ivy Township
...and all others further away

Not compatible with:
- Eggplant Safehouse

Huge thanks to Cor for making a video!

Map Folder: pz_rosewoodexp_map

publishedfiledetails.title: Rosewood VHS & Gun Stores
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Since Rosewood is missing a VHS store and a guns store, this mod adds one of each, south of Rosewood.

The VHS store is right next to the southern gas station, with an appartment on the second floor.

The gun store is quite isolated in the woods, and to get inside, you'll need a sledgehammer.

There is no spawn point to directly spawn there. Just spawn in Rosewood and head south.

Zombie density is slightly increased compared to vanilla. 

The cell used is 27x40.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]Compatibility[/h1]
I haven't found an other map that uses this cell. If you do, share it in the comments.

Compatible with:
[list]
[*]Rosewood Expansion
[*]Rosewood Cabins
[*]Rosewood Military Hospital
[*]Westwood
[*]Save Your Station!
[*]Access Road (Research Facility)
[*]...And many more
[/list]

NOT Compatible with:
[list]
[*]10 Years Later (it changes the entire map)
[*] SecretZ's Rosewood Fossoil Blockade.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]

[b]Do you like this? Try my other map : [/b]
[list]
[*] [u][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2721653030]West Point Trailer Park & VHS Store[/url][/u] : It adds a VHS store south of West Point since it's missing one.
[*][u][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3025055056]West Point Gated Community[/url][/u] : It adds a rich gated community North of West Point.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]

[h1]"We want to use this map in a mod pack, do we have permission ?"[/h1]
Yes, as long as it's a private mod pack.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]"Can I add this midgame ?"[/h1]
If you haven't visited Rosewood in your saved game, yes.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]"How do I get in the gunstore?"[/h1]
Sledgehammer your way in.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]For Multiplayer: instructions given by a comment below :[/h1]
How to get the mod to work:
1. Go to the "Map" section of sandbox settings.
2. Choose the map ("Rosewood VHS Store") from the dropdown menu under "Add an available map to the list".
3. Click on "Muldraugh, KY" in the "Maps used by this server" box and click "Move down" until it's at the bottom of the list.

[hr][/hr]

Map Folder: Rosewood VHS Store

[/list]

[b]Wiki[/b]

[/list]

publishedfiledetails.title: Shared Global Map
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Shared Global Map[/h1]

Share one single map between all players on the server.

[b]Shared Global Map[/b] is a [b]global[/b] map sharing mod for Project Zomboid Build 41.
This mod is [b]not faction-based[/b]: all map information is shared between every player using the mod on the server.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Main Feature[/h2]

- Map annotations are shared between all players.
- When a player places, edits, moves or removes an annotation, other players receive the update.
- When a player reads a paper map, the revealed map area is shared with everyone else.
- General map exploration is also shared.
- A player joining later receives the current shared map state.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Improved Annotation Palette[/h2]

- Reworked annotation palette with [b]Favorites[/b] and [b]Recent[/b] symbols.
- Quick favorite toggle with [b]right click[/b].
- Easier symbol access for the most commonly used annotations.
- Built-in [b]annotation size[/b] setting for both symbols and text.
- The map annotation workflow has been adjusted to feel faster and smoother to use.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]City Names On The Map[/h2]

- City names can appear on the world map after discovery.
- They can also appear after reading a city map.
- Their display adapts to the map zoom level.
- City label size can be configured.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Players On The Map[/h2]

- Player markers can appear on the world map and mini-map.
- Each player can choose their own marker color in Mod Options.
- This can be useful for teams, groups, or personal preference.
- Your own name is hidden on the map and mini-map, while other players' names can still be shown.
- Player marker color is now saved in the current save/session.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Mod Options[/h2]

- Enable or disable the [b]Favorites / Recent[/b] palette sorting.
- Enable or disable [b]city name labels[/b].
- Change the [b]city label size[/b].

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Map Reset Menu[/h2]

The [b]?[/b] button on the world map opens a reset menu.

- Clear shared annotations.
- Clear map discoveries.

[b]Important:[/b] for the host / admin, clearing discoveries can also reset the shared discovered map state for everyone. The menu clearly warns about it.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Compatibility / Conflicts[/h2]

- This mod is not designed for faction-based map sharing.
- If you want faction-only map sharing, use another mod made for that purpose.
- Because annotation palette improvements and annotation size controls are already built in, this mod can conflict with another mod that edits the same world map annotation UI.
- In practice, avoid using it together with another mod that reorganizes map symbols or adds its own symbol size slider.

[hr][/hr]

[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701602542]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/EkDPdKa.png[/img]
[/url]

Workshop ID: 3700272975
Mod ID: sharedglobalmap

publishedfiledetails.title: Shine Together
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1][b]Happy to announce that [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3265192036]Shine Together: AuthenticZ(Glowsticks)[/url] is OUT NOW ![/b][/h1]

[h1][b]Say Goodbye to the Darkness ![/b][/h1]

[h2]Disclaimer: This mod doesn't provide the ability to attach flashlight to anywhere. You need to use other mods for that[/h2]

[h2]Overview[/h2]

I know you guys hate it when you attach you flashlight on to your belt and your friends couldn't see if you already turn the flashlight on or off yet. Well. Say no more!

[b]No more invisible light sources attached to other players![/b] With this mod, you'll finally be able to see the light emitted by your friends' flashlights, lanterns, and torches, making nighttime excursions with your fellow survivors much safer and more enjoyable.

[h2]Compatibility[/h2]

This mod works with every drainable light sources in the game that aren't using their own light update function

[u]Before you ask any questions[/u], sadly this mod isn't working for [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2200148440&searchtext=brita] Brita's Weapon Pack [/url][b][u]YET![/u][/b] Since, they are using their own light update function that doesn't follow vanilla light behaviour. I am currently finding a way to workaround this problem right as I publishing this mod and perhaps in the near future I could have compatibility version for those mods

[h2]Load Order[/h2]

It is highly recommend to put this mod at the lowest priority of the load order. Since this mod needs to function after any activities that happen in the game

[hr][/hr]

[h2]FAQ[/h2]

[h3]Q: Can I use this mod in multiplayer games?[/h3]
Yes! Shine Together is fully compatible with multiplayer.

[h3]Q: Does this mod affect performance?[/h3]
No, Shine Together is designed to have minimal impact on performance.

[h3]Q: Will this mod conflict with other mods?[/h3]
As of the lastest update the mod won't need to overwrite vanilla mods so there will be no conflict between mods.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Thank You![/h2]

Workshop ID: 3236042638
Mod ID: shine_together

publishedfiledetails.title: Slow Consumption
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Slow Consumption

[h1]Tired of constantly having to change the empty battery in your flashlight? Or finding a new soap or lighter to replace the empty one? Or even changing colored light bulbs too often?[/h1]

[b]Because we've all done this too many times. This mod does all of these at once:[/b]

 🔹 Reduces flashlight battery consumption by 2
 🔹 Reduces soap consumption by 2
 🔹 Reduces lighter/matches consumption by 2
 🔹 Increases colored light bulb condition by 10

[h2]🆕 Want to adjust even more items? Try this mod :
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2930480208][b]Custom Consumption[/b] - Adjusts more than 100 items in sandbox options[/url][/h2]

[h3] ◽ Supported Version: 41.73+[/h3]
[h3] ◽ Compatible with Singleplayer and Multiplayer[/h3]
[h3] ◽ Works on existing saves (*)[/h3]
(*) [i] only partially consumed colored bulbs will not be updated.[/i]

[img]https://i.imgur.com/cKVBRWw.gif[/img]

[b]What exactly does this mod change?[/b]
[list]
    [*]Reduction of torch [i][yellow flashlight][/i] battery consumption from 0.0009 to 0.00045
    [*]Reduction of handtorch [i][black flashlight][/i] battery consumption from 0.0004 to 0.0002
    [*]Reduction of soap consumption from 0.05 to 0.025
    [*]Reduction of matches consumption from 0.1 to 0.05
    [*]Reduction of lighter consumption to 0.015
    [*]Increase of lighter "ticksPerEquipUse" [i][as a light source][/i] from 110 to 220
    [*]Increase of colored light bulb "ConditionMax" from 10 to 100 [i][like a default light bulb][/i]
[/list]

[i]This mod can be added to or removed from a save file at any time.[/i]

[list]
    [*][b]Tired from other excessive consumption? [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2864231031/5401527630814773921]Let me know here[/url]![/b]
    [*][b]Report a bug or any issue [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2864231031/5401527630814782020]here[/url]![/b]
[/list]

[i]Check out my other mods:[/i]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2930480208][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2039603793765466866/2547C8173DA3829D3150B12EF8BA62FEFB81015D/?imw=110&imh=110&ima=fit&impolicy=Letterbox&imcolor=%23000000&letterbox=true[/img][/url] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2877607825][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1917996386821647246/C1A69B97506D22E3148CE3A0CFAD632D92F40965/?imw=110&imh=110&ima=fit&impolicy=Letterbox&imcolor=%23000000&letterbox=true[/img][/url] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2870675836][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1809908551153575484/DDD2B5E5C48DFAAF4520627FCD6F50283014EB64/?imw=110&imh=110&ima=fit&impolicy=Letterbox&imcolor=%23000000&letterbox=true[/img][/url]

publishedfiledetails.title: Small Town First Responders - Core Mod
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Hi.
STFR's been going strong for years now. So it's only fair a massive rewrite happens to clean things up.
The good:
* STFR No longer relies on map files to work.
* The code's been heavily simplified to make addon creation a breeze.
* There's a proper update schedule. No more updates willy nilly.

The bad:
* This rewrite is not compatible with old saves.
* ALL old versions of the mod and all old addons are unlisted. Link-Only access. Mainly to reduce confusion.

The ugly:
* My face. Nuff said.

So, with that being said. This is the core mod with all the core code, and some generic liveries. Yes, it can be ran standalone.

The list of official addons can be found in the discord.

Credits:
Code: Jack, albion.
Textures: soze, Jan2004p, Bill, evansmine8, Emma, Henry, Racer.

Special thanks to Guardian, Frozen and Doe!

HUGE thanks to shark for letting us use the Police Belt model from his law enforcement mod. Though we did make our own textures for it. And thanks to StarFireReaper for making the 1987 GMC armored truck model for us.

HUMONGOUS thanks to Albion for her extremely helpful support of the mod. Seriously, she's a legend!

A MASSIVE thanks to Greywolf for some of the VVE textures. The STFR community is great.

publishedfiledetails.title: Snow is water [B41.74 Legacy]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Info[/h1]
Snow is still water, so Rain Collectors and Metal Barrels will be filled when snowing, just at a slower rate (50%).
It's a small mod that I created for myself for winter storm playthroughs. It works great paired with mods such as [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2210760610]Cryogenic winter[/url], [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2686791433]Eternal Snow[/url] or [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2086715842]Infinite Weather[/url]. 
[h3][b]The light version works in SP and MP the latest builds of b41![/b][/h3]

[h1]THIS IS A LEGACY MOD[/h1]
[h3]It will only work for b41 and will not show up for b42 and beyond. This mod won't be updated for b42 since this feature is already a part of that version of the game. [/h3]

[h2]Features[/h2]
Included in this version:
[list]
[*]Rain Barrels (both variants) are filled up when it snows at a slower rate (50%).
[*]Metal Barrels are filled up when it snows at a slower rate (50%). 
[/list]

[h2]If you liked the mod, please let me know[/h2]
I really appreciate all the comments and positive feedback I've received. Thanks a lot to all of you who decided to spend some time to write them down :)

[img]https://i.imgur.com/31mCw6B.gif[/img]

Want to help me even more? [url=https://ko-fi.com/buhorl]Give me a ko-fi! [/url]
[url=https://ko-fi.com/buhorl][img]https://i.imgur.com/5zacwdR.png[/img][/url]

publishedfiledetails.title: Standardized Vehicle Upgrades 2 (OLD)
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b]Updated version available here. This version will no longer receive updates.[/b]
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3304580957

[h1]What does this do?[/h1]
A car armor mod that covers every vanilla vehicle, every Fili's vehicle and the Petyarbuilt379. [b]You should not[/b] enable submods for vehicle mods you are not using. [b]Missing dependencies are normal.[/b]

[h1]To craft the items:[/h1]
There are magazines that can be found in the world, read them to learn the respective recipes required for upgrades:
- Vanilla upgrades - "Magazine «Autotsar Tuning Atelier - Standard Models»"
- Fili upgrades - "Magazine «Autotsar Tuning Atelier - Advanced Models»"
- Petyarbuilt upgrades - "Magazine «Autotsar Tuning Atelier - Petyarbuilt 379»"
- Some recipes require for you to have read some of the vanilla vehicle repair magazines (auto manuals).

[h1]Regarding Existing Saves:[/h1]
Enable the "Zombie Items" submod in your save. Some zombies will rarely drop the magazines. They can be dropped by mechanic, metalworker, construction, redneck, militia, raider, and survivor zombies.

[h1]Having problems with cheat menu?[/h1]
- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2961381639]Use this version[/url]

[h1]Supported vehicles:[/h1]
- Vanilla
- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2788428718]Vanilla Vehicles Enhancer[/url] (Uses the vanilla cars submod)

- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2782258356]Petyarbuilt 379[/url] (completely redoes the armor to match the other cars supported, uses the Petyarbuilt 379 cars submod)
- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2719592131]Tread's Water Tank Trucks[/url] (Only the army water tanker for now, uses the Fili's cars submod)

- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3123709351]Small Town First Responders + Addons[/url] (Uses the Vanilla and/or Fili's cars submods)

publishedfiledetails.title: Standardized Vehicle Upgrades 3 - Core
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b]Attention![/b]
This is a re-re-release of Standardized Vehicle Upgrades. This time massive code cleanup, and easier addon code!

[b]I WILL NOT BE ADDING SUPPORT FOR ANY CAR MODS MYSELF BEYOND WHAT'S IN THE VANILLA ADDON!!![/b]
Due to workload, the Filibuster's and Petyarbuilt supports have been dropped.
People are welcome to re-add these supports into SVU3 on their own.

[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3304582091]Vanilla Addon![/url]

[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3304582757]Example Addon![/url]

[h1]What does this do?[/h1]
I present Standardized Vehicle Upgrades3. A car armor mod that covers every single vanilla car. Instead of personalized armor for each car, I went with a more standardized approach. So the end user isn't forced into using the vehicles the mod author wants them to.

[h1]To craft the items:[/h1]
There are magazines that can be found in the world, read them to learn the respective recipes required for upgrades:
- Some recipes require for you to have read some of the vanilla vehicle repair magazines (auto manuals).

[h1]Regarding Existing Saves:[/h1]
Simply enable the new "Zombie Items" submod in your save, then kill some mechanic, metalworker, construction, redneck, militia, raider, and/or survivor zombies. "Zombie Items" allows for these zombie types to rarely spawn the magazines.

[h1]Discord[/h1]
Feel free to join the STFR & SVU server to ask for support, give suggestions or simply to keep up with the mod's development!
https://discord.gg/HeMWr3AkTk

[h1]Known issues[/h1]
- Balancing might be a little wacky. Feedback required.

[h1]Cheat menu???[/h1]
- [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2961381639]Use this version[/url]

[h1]ModIDs?[/h1]
StandardizedVehicleUpgrades3Core - Core Files. Required by all.
StandardizedVehicleUpgrades3TS - Reduces Upgrading Volume. - OPTIONAL
StandardizedVehicleUpgrades3ZI - Zombie Items. - OPTIONAL

publishedfiledetails.title: Stop, Drop 'n Roll (the "Fire Self-Extinguish" Mod)!
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Stop, Drop, and Roll![/h1]
"Stop, drop, and roll" is a fire-safety technique for when your clothes catch fire.

If your clothes catch fire:
[list]
 [*] STOP where are you are!
 [*] DROP to the ground and cother your nose and mouth!
 [*] ROLL over back and forth until the flames are out!
[/list]

Please note that clothes can get damaged from this technique, and you should quickly clean and dress any burns as soon as possible.

(The above text is a parody and should not be considered as valid medical or fire-safety advice in any form or fashion.)

[h2]How the mod works[/h2]
If you catch yourself on fire, you can right-click anywhere and select 'Stop, Drop 'n Roll.'  This will extinguish the flames, but is likely to add holes to your clothing.  The number of holes added is based around your character's luck levels.

Works in Multiplayer!

Workshop ID: 2908614026
Mod ID: DropRollMod

publishedfiledetails.title: Take Any Amount
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Build 42 Version by KaliLynx[/h1]
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3389115640

[hr][/hr]

[h1]Take Any Amount[/h1]

This mod enhances your gameplay experience by granting you greater control over item management within containers. With this mod, you have the ability to select any desired quantity of items from a stack in a container, as well as transfer them into the container that is currently in focus.

Normally, when interacting with containers, you can only choose to grab one item, half of the stack, or the entire stack. However, with this mod, a convenient 'select amount' option is introduced. By clicking on it, a user-friendly textbox opens up, allowing you to enter the precise quantity of items you wish to take.

Moreover, if you intend to transfer items from your inventory to a container, the tooltip now indicates which container is currently in focus, making the process even more seamless and intuitive.

Entering negative numbers, non-digits won't do anything, your game will not crash or throw errors. Numbers larger than the maximum amount will transfer all items.

[h1]Does this work on existing saves?[/h1]
Yes, you can add and remove this mod at anytime

[h1]Does this work in multiplayer?[/h1]
Yes

[h1]Translations[/h1]
[list]
[*]English
[*]German
[*]Spanish (by [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198874558693]CarlosRojasCu[/url])

[/list]

[h1]Spectate[/h1]
[list]
[*]Simple interface for spectating in multiplayer.
[*]Spectating remove all interactions.
[*]Spectating makes invisible.
[*]Spectating allows to follow other player's medical state from any distance.
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2970134188]Battle Royale[/url] mod for example.


[h1]Player Variables[/h1]
[list]
[*]Simple interface for spreading player variables in multiplayer.
[*]Adds IsoPlayer Flags to player variables.
[*]Corrects ZombiesDontAttack flag. Inspired by [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2981216690]Camouflage[/url] from the awesome [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/BitBraven/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]Braven[/url].
[*]Player variables are (mainly) used for animations.
[*]Adds isCmdReady(). A function to know when sendClientCommand can be safely used in MP.
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2991010328]Infected Player[/url] mod for example.


[h1]Movement control[/h1]
[list]
[*]Simple interface for movement control.
[*]Simple interface for teleport.
[*]Vanilla movement speed recomputed with lua.
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2986578314/3812909627184558592/]Tuning options[/url] for movement speed.
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3002243696]No Limping[/url] mod for example.


[h1]World Chat[/h1]
[list]

[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2986578314/6458775074329393731/]Detailed interface[/url].
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3004974776]NPC Baelin The Fisherman[/url] mod for example.


[h1]UI[/h1]
[list]
[*]Simple interface for [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2986578314/3812909188452909116/]custom keybinds[/url]. Credits to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Star[/url].
[*]Simple interface for adding a new tab to Character Info window.
[*]Adds Player ModData Debug to Debug Dev menu (below Global Mod Data Debug).
[*]Draw circles on world (better than vanilla).
[*]Draw lines (better than vanilla). [Not always displayed]
[*]Shows modded icon in Item List. Thx to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/NotNotloc/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]Notloc[/url].
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2970134188]Battle Royale[/url] mod for drawing example.


[h1]Geometry[/h1]
[list]
[*]Detects point inclusion in triangle.
[*]Detects point inclusion in rectangle.
[*]Detects intersecting point of two segments.
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2970134188]Battle Royale[/url] mod for example.


[h1]Targeting[/h1]
[list]

[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2986715593]Portal Gun[/url] mod for example.


[h1]luautils[/h1]

[*]Transform square to table for data storage.
[*]Formatting table, square, player for easy debug.
[/list]
see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2986715593]Portal Gun[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2970134188]Battle Royale[/url] mods for examples.

publishedfiledetails.title: that DAMN Library
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b]What is this?[/b]
This is a framework that fuels all KI5 mods, one centralized place to fine tune and expand all mods and make them ready for game changes and new features. 

You can find more about it here for B41: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3262959206]that DAMN Library - Crafting, Fixing and Recycling explained[/url], B42 guide is coming soon.

[b]Why do i need this?[/b]
It is a required mod for running KI5 mods, expanding them with crafting and recycling features for almost all parts, handy tire repair kit, plastic welder and many other things. All of those features are already available to most mods already released, try them out.

[b]Why are the comments closed?[/b]
There is no need for them here, all mod related stuff can be discussed on mod pages of those mods. That way i know what mod could be impacted.

[b]Can I use this for my mods?[/b]
Not yet, the contents of this library will be changing in the next weeks without any warnings so it's better to wait while we fine tune the things and give a green light for wide use.

[b]I found a bug, what now?[/b]
Hit the discussions of affected mods and give us detailed report of what happened.



[b]If you like the mod, you can buy us a coffee[/b],

[url=https://ko-fi.com/ki5mods][img]https://i.imgur.com/krzPSAF.png[/img] KI5[/url] [url=https://ko-fi.com/bknht][img]https://i.imgur.com/krzPSAF.png[/img] bikinihorst[/url]



[b]Credits:[/b]
[list]
[*]Thanks to The Indie Stone for making this awesome game and all this possible
[*]Shoutout to The Fry, Gilrin, Foji_C, pbmike, Gkmatt, OxTailSafu, martincrup88, 十叁, SP4RTAN and marshmallow justice for helping with bug hunting
[*]Big thanks to all the people in the community that supported and helped in any way!
[/list]


[quote=KI5]

Ask for permission
This mod can only be added to and extended with the express permission from the original creators. If no permission is received you may not alter the mod, and it must be treated as a mod that is 'On Lockdown'. You are not allowed to repack this mod under any circumstances, ever. [/quote]

[b]Compatibility:[/b]

✅ B41 (b41.78.19) Single Player / Multiplayer fully supported
✅ B42 (b42.12) Single Player fully supported (Feature locked as of April 2026)
✅ B42 (b42.13/14/15/16/17) Single Player / Multiplayer fully supported

publishedfiledetails.title: The Workshop
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1] Welcome! [/h1]
This mod adds more crafting features to the game!
With this mod you no longer have to drop your broken tools on the ground.
Now you can disassemble them for scrap (screws, metal parts, wood)
You can also disassemble any metallic vanilla item in the game to get small amounts of metal scrap.
This mod also works with other popular mods like Bushcraft Tools!
To disassemble something you need a Metal Workbench which needs to be learned by a recipe book and some metalworking skill. You can scrap items in the "Scrapping" crafting tab.
This mod also adds a few more crafting items and tools which are needed for the scrap series mods.
All items have 3D models and textures.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/p7Fv1Z6.gif[/img]

[b] UPDATE: [/b]
Fixed all loophole exploits.

[b] COMING SOON: [/b]
More crafting components
More mod compatibility

[b] KNOWN ISSUES: [/b]
None

Thanks to Chuck for the cool preview image!

publishedfiledetails.title: They Knew [B41]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b]The Update for B42 can be found [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3387110070]RIGHT HERE[/url]

[h1]They Knew[/h1]
The Knox county incident was never a "random accident" or whatever the news was saying. Someone knew about this. They were there on the ground to observe the effects. What they didn't know, was how bad it was going to be.

Search the map for a new rare zombie! This zombie has a medicine for the zombie infection on them. I wanted a zombie virus cure that combined danger with reward. There are several zombie cures out there, this one is my version. The spawn rate is configurable in the Sandbox Variables.

[h1]TRANSLATIONS[/h1]
[list]
[*]Traditional Chinese - [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198123107938]Person B[/url]
[*]Russian - [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199126958569]юmix[/url] & [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/agitatio]Agitatio[/url] & [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198042104310]Opex[/url]
[/list]

[h1]THIS MOD ADDS[/h1]
[list]
[*] A new Hazmat Suit
[*] A new satchel
[*] Zomboxivir: The inhalant that can purge you of the zombie virus. Further infections are unaffected.
[*] Zomboxycycline: These pills are used in a manner similar to Malaria prevention medication. These pills prevent infection for 24 hours. Don't forget to take your medicine! (This is disabled by default, you need to up the drop chance in the sandbox options if you want it to spawn)
[/list]

[h1]SANDBOX OPTIONS[/h1]
The default for this zombie is 500. This means the mob is VERY RARE. The rest of the zombies in the default category have values between 20000 and 2000. The golfer zombie for instance (quite rare), has a score of 2000. Park rangers have a score of 10000.

[h1]FAQ:[/h1]
[list]
[*][b][u]Can this mod be installed on an existing game/server?[/u][/b]
[*][i]Yep! Should just work. You will need to go to new areas to start seeing the zeds, or wait for respawns.[/i]
[*][b][u]Is this multiplayer ready?[/u][/b]
[*][i]Yep![/i]
[*][b][u]There are too many of this zombie![/u][/b]
[*][i]On single player: Install [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2670674997]THIS[/url] mod. Change the spawn rate.[/i]
[*][i]On multi player: See below.[/i]
[*][b][u]How do I configure the sandbox settings for a dedicated server?[/u][/b]
[i]Load your dedicated server settings in the "host" option (click HOST instead of JOIN, or SOLO). Then, configure the sandbox settings there. Once you are done (lowest setting would be 1 instead of 50) save the settings, and exit host. Restart your server, and it should use the new sandbox settings. (TIP: This can be done even after the server has been going for a while, just close the server, load the file, edit and save. Next time you restart server, the settings will have changed).[/i]
[*][b][u]When should I use my dose?[/u][/b]
[*][i]The best way to know when to use it, is when your character starts showing signs of infection! (Nausea, Nervousness)[/i]
[*][b][u]Do I need 1 dose for each bite?[/u][/b]
[*][i]No. One dose will cure all infection on you. Even if you get bit 20 times.[/i]
[*][b][u]Why is the bite still there after I use the cure.[/u][/b]
[*][i]Bite injuries will have to heal normally. The infection is the only thing removed.[/i]
[/list]

[h1]Add-Ons[/h1]
[list]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2743283396&tscn=1644042317]Tactical Satchel With Bags for They Knew[/url] by Aristine
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2593268632]Eliaz Better Bags & Backpacks B41[/url] by Eliaz
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2892537910]They Knew Cure In Medical[/url] by Loki

[/list]

[h1]ROADMAP: FUTURE PLANS[/h1]
[list]
   [*]More Mysterious Agents.
   [*]"Not a Cure" option, where the Zomboxivir only delays the inevitable.
   [*]Random "They Knew" events.
[/list]

[h1]MY OTHER MODS[/h1]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2715579154][img]https://i.imgur.com/RsLmxJ5.png[/img][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2721290568][img]https://i.imgur.com/VGB0Nst.png[/img][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2721945297][img]https://i.imgur.com/BxI7nxk.png[/img][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2741190154][img]https://i.imgur.com/OFSt08b.png[/img][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2762807877][img]https://i.imgur.com/AxPnnc7.png[/img][/url]

[b]I would do modding full time if I could afford it. If you feel like nudging that in the right direction, hit me on Kofi[/b]
[url=https://ko-fi.com/udomakestuff]Ko-Fi Here[/url]

[code][b]Ask for permission[/b]
This mod can only be added to and extended with the express permission from the original creator. Having received permission, credit must be given to the original creator, both within the files of the mod and wherever the mod roams online.[/code]

publishedfiledetails.file_description:
You can add and remove this mod to your old saves with no issues

Zombie cures from the mod "They Knew" will now very rarely spawn in medical supplies such as hospitals. [b]Will not spawn in bathrooms, cabinets etc. ONLY in medical supplies, including secret labs and military camps[/b]

Item spawn rate details below.

- 7 times rarer than antibiotics on average.
- In military medical containers, 7 times rarer than beta blockers, antidepressants etc.

publishedfiledetails.title: Thread and Twine
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Adds simple recipes that allow you to make thread, twine and rope from ripped sheets, AND GAIN XP DOING IT!







Ever found yourself in need of any of the 3 and thought to yourself, why can't I just use a series of sheet ropes to make an actual rope?

Or how about, why can't I cut these ripped sheets down into basic threads, which ripped sheets are made of?

And finally, why can't I pull this rope into smaller pieces, twine, and use it for my fishing rod?

No more will anyone be struck down in the wilderness by these silly redundancies!
With this mod, the obstacles that are sewing, twining and roping will no longer be a hindrance to you!
Be free to take on more important matters at hand with this simple mod!

Please note, this mod isn't intended to be realistic and might make tailoring a lot easier for you, but alas, to each their own.

A huge thanks to RapidMinimumBeaver for adding a lot of flavor to this mod, by writing the code to gain small amounts of XP from the recipes.

[img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/819002974403344349/DD18664314A26EA83C62E9B0127FFCB35092B53A/[/img]

publishedfiledetails.title: throttlekitty's tiles
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
This is a collection of world tile sprites I've made to be used as a resource in creating custom maps. Some sprites may have additional functionality, I'll be including lua for those in this mod as needed. I don't plan on making anything here craftable, however.

Currently supports b41.xx IWBUMS

For Players: You only need this if you've downloaded a custom map that requires this mod.


For Modders: Editor tilesheets are found in the in my google drive, place them in your Tiles\2x\ folder with the others.
I've included my own copy of BuildingFurniture.txt. This goes in %userprofile%\.TileZed\
You may want to make a backup of that file first, my copy includes many fixes for the building editor objects as well as adding my own tiles.

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1i2VYWHNvrGXfDS1dv_9VYgCnI4PpTqxc?usp=sharing

Your mod.info needs to have this line: require=tkTiles_01

Be aware that this is a work in progress, I won't try to break maps with updates, just know that it can happen if I need to make changes that do. If tile positions in this mod change, check out the TileZed lua scripts, there are examples of how to swap a tile instance with another.


Anyone is free to use or modify anything in this mod for their own, I just ask to be credited, no need to ask me directly. Have fun with them!

Additional Credits:
Filibuster Rhymes

publishedfiledetails.title: Tidy Up Meister
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h2][b]The auto-return feature from this mod has been added to the vanilla game in Build 42.8.0. However, the vanilla implementation still doesn’t support certain actions ? like cocking guns, handling magazines, or restoring placed items. This mod continues to support those cases, and it does not interfere with the vanilla auto-return behavior. So even if the mod is enabled, vanilla features will still function normally. I recommend keeping the mod enabled if you want full compatibility across all actions![/b][/h2]

[h1]Overview :[/h1]
Automatically returns to the original equipment when the operation is completed.
[b][i]Confirmed to work with Build 41/42 and also work on MP.[/i][/b]

[h1]Features :[/h1]
[list]
[*]When an action that switches equipment when performed, such as dismantle, is completed, the equipment is automatically restored to its original state.
[*]When automatically returning equipment, if the equipment was in a container, it will be returned to original container.
[*]You can toggle whether or not to re-equipment from the context menu. This setting will continue in each character, so you can use it when you want to continuously dismantle.
[*]For details, please check the introduce movie above.
[/list]

[h1]Additional Actions :[/h1]
These actions can be toggle enable/disable with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Mod Options[/url].
[list]
[*]Build actions (Metalwork / Carpentry)
[*]Firearms actions (upgrade / magazine / bullets / rack)
[*]Fitness actions
[*]Eat food actions (Including lighter/match on Smoking)
[*]Take pills actions
[*]Reading actions
[*]Medical actions
[*]Light fire actions
[*]Refueling actions [img]https://imgur.com/cvRLqOL.png[/img]
[/list]

[h1]Options :[/h1]
These options are available with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Mod Options[/url] in B41.
[list]
[*]Force Re-Equip : Normally, it will not be re-equipped when the operation is interrupted, but turning it on will force to be re-equipped only hand-held items.
[*]Use Context Menu : Allow the context menu to toggle between re-equipping and not.
[*]Restore Original Location : When returning used items to the ground, they will be restored to their original placement location. [img]https://imgur.com/cvRLqOL.png[/img]
[/list]

[h1]Supported Mods :[/h1]
[list]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3416208765]Bath Towels Overhaul[/url]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2368058459]Better Lockpicking[/url] (Including based on Better Lockpicking)
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2875848298]Common Sense[/url]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2982070344]Inventory Tetris[/url]
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3422220305]Picking Meister[/url] (Only in B42)
[*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2503622437]Skill Recovery Journal[/url]
[/list]

[h1]Known Issues :[/h1]
[list]
[*]Nothing
[h3][b]This mod contains many unconventional implementations and may cause unpredictable behavior. I will do my best to address any issues, so if you encounter a problem, please report to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/2769706949/4638240084912525660/]Bug & Issue Reports[/url] with the following details and please do not post bug reports in “Public User Comments”.[/b][/h3]
[list]
[*]What action you were performing and how
[*]Any potentially related mods
[*]Whether you are using B41 or B42, etc...
[/list]
[/list]

[h1]Future plans :[/h1]
[list]
[*]Bug fix (if exists)
[/list]

[h1]Remarks :[/h1]
[list]
[*]You may add it to your mod pack without confirmation and credit. However, please use at your own risk, as I have not been able to verify that it works with SP.
[*][h3][b]If you were unable to log in to the MP server due to an upgrade of this mod, please try the previous versions by downloading them from "Change Notes".[/b][/h3]
[/list]

[h1]Release Notes :[/h1]
[list]
[*]v1.37 - Hotfix for Build 42.15.
[*]v1.36 - Hotfix for Build 42.13.
[*]v1.35 - Fixed error on B42.11.0.
[*]v1.34 - Supported B42 X/Y rotation restore.
[*]v1.33 - Supported Bath Towels Overhaul.
Please refer to "Change Notes" for the older history.
[/list]

[url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199151439614/myworkshopfiles/][img]https://imgur.com/VE2Dqpw.png[/img][/url]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2890440427][img]https://imgur.com/7nnRZhd.png[/img][/url]
[b]My most favorite mod, "Pump Pury" has been flagged as sensitive content and is no longer visible to many users. Please help rescue this mod![/b]

[code]
If you enjoy this mod and would like to support its development, you can do so through the services below. Your support helps cover the cost of renting a dedicated server for multiplayer testing, as well as AI service subscriptions used for development - expenses I personally pay for every month, totaling over $50. Thanks to your support, I can continue improving, maintaining, and expanding this mod for everyone.

[url=https://ko-fi.com/pepepepepeil][img]https://imgur.com/y5Ih4mO.png[/img][/url]
[/code]

publishedfiledetails.title: True Actions. Act 1 & 2 - Sitting & Lying [Only for B41]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[url=patreon.com/_tsar][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2047488292130357038/307A1EFBD98F7B63C736466AACD5CF58235FB88A/[/img][/url]

[quote]
[h1]WARNING[/h1]
#To make the mod work in multiplayer in the server config disable anti-cheat protection for type 12.
AntiCheatProtectionType12=false
[/quote]

[h2]Act 2 - Lying[/h2]

Added the ability to lie on beds, sofas and other suitable items (over 200 tiles for lying).

[u]Lying is not available on some beds that face north or west.[/u]

[h2]Act 1 - Sitting[/h2]

Mod adds the ability to sit on chairs, armchairs, sofas and other items (over 160 tiles for seating). While sitting, all activities are available and all animations are played (reading, eating, drinking, etc.).

[u]Due to the limitations of the game engine, you can only sit on objects directed to the south and east.[/u]

[img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1660101375273576639/0C12E325C464F5DC166E5FF2AB70A43581BED64F/[/img]

Animations created by Martin Greenall of The Indie Stone for use in future versions of Project Zomboid, and modified by IBrRus.

publishedfiledetails.title: True Actions. Act 3 - Dancing
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[url=patreon.com/_tsar][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2047488292130357038/307A1EFBD98F7B63C736466AACD5CF58235FB88A/[/img][/url]
Almost all important events in the life of a primitive man were marked by dancing: birth, death, war, the election of a new leader, the healing of the sick. These dances expressed prayers for rain, sunshine, fertility, protection, and forgiveness.

Dancing is exactly what you need in these difficult times. That is why we have published the magazine "Dance".  Explore 45 different dance moves by finding and reading the issues of our new magazine.

We'll remind you that the general partner of the magazine is TMC, the producer of the сereal, Kosmotsars.

Kosmotsars are lovingly made from 100% natural ingredients and whole grains, which is why they are so nutritious and healthy. Each cereal pack contains one trading card that will give you access to a unique dance move. Delight your family with a delicious breakfast, and your neighbors with a wonderful dance.

[img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1660101375273576639/0C12E325C464F5DC166E5FF2AB70A43581BED64F/[/img]

[h1]FAQ:[/h1]
[b]How to dance?[/b]
Open the emotion menu (press and hold Q) and select the appropriate item.

[b]Will the mod work if I add it to an existing save?[/b]
Yes, it will.

[b]How do I learn the dance?[/b]
You need to find and read a dance magazine.

[b]Do I necessarily need a magazine to learn a dance?[/b]
At the beginning of the game, each player knows 3 random dances. The remaining dances can be learned from the magazine, or find a trading card.

[b]What are the trading cards for?[/b]
When a trading card is in a player's inventory, a special dance becomes available to him. Each card has its own dance.

[b]Can I learn the trading card dance?[/b]
No, the dance will only be available if the card is in a player's inventory.

[b]Where can I get trading cards?[/b]
The cards can be found in the сereal, Kosmotsars. These boxes of сereal appear on store shelves, in houses, and in other places where сereal should appear.

[h3]Credits:[/h3] 
Thanks to AuthenticPeach for help with this mod.

publishedfiledetails.title: True Crawl 3.0 [Updated B41]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀[b]TRUE CRAWL B41 3.0 Update[/b][/h1][h3][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3008448748]⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀(Click here)[/url] to see the changelog[/h3]

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀[i]"This mod adds a completely new way to play Zomboid!"[/i]

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀[img]https://media.giphy.com/media/SWcZRKiIiKpi0Ltxzk/giphy.gif[/img]
   ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀[img]https://imgur.com/6OBlYju.gif[/img]

[quote][h2]PLEASE, support my work if you liked my mod. Your support would help me alot to keep working on modding. I'm planning to bring to life a full I am the Legend Mod for B42 soon![/h2]

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ [url=patreon.com/user?u=76595597][img]https://i.imgur.com/q0g31Cn.png[/img][/url][/quote]

⠀⠀⠀[h2][b]FEATURES[/b][/h2]
[list]
[*][b][i]NOW YOU CAN CRAWL BY HOLDING THE "CROUCH" KEY. (DEFAULT = C)[/i][/b]
[*][i]Crawl anywhere you want, using [/i][b][i]W A S D[/i][/b][i] (You can also crawl under vehicles!)[/i]
[*][i]Crawl under vehicles (Use the default [/i][b][i]SHIFT[/i][/b][i] key while crawling near to a vehicle!)[/i]
[*][b][i]NOW FIRING WHILE PRONE HAS A PRECISION BONUS.[/i][/b]
[*][b][i]Prone Hit Chance Bonus:[/i][/b] Increases the Hit Chance while prone.
[*][b][i]Prone Crit Chance Bonus:[/i][/b] Increases the Critical Chance while prone.

⠀⠀⠀[h2][b]Plans for the future (Depends on you)[/b][/h2]
[list]
[*][b]New animations for reaload the weapon while prone.[/b] 
[*][b]More realistic details.[/b] 
[/list]
[hr]
       [h2] HOW THE STEALTH MODE WORKS? [/h2]
The Stealth Mode simple makes the zombie not see the player when it's crawling. The player can configure the sandbox options to change the [b]ZombieRadius[/b] to make the detection distance long or shorter.

       [h2] HOW THE PRONE AIM BONUS WORKS? [/h2]
The bonus, is related to your current Aiming level. It's a modifier that applies the values you've chosen in the Sandbox Options, the more level you have in Aiming, the better is the buff. At least, this is how it's supposed to work. Tell me if you find any issues in the calculations.

[h2]WORKS ON EXISTING SAVES, BUT[/h2]
[i]It's not likely to break your save, but considering it's a [b]UNSTABLE[/b] version, please [b]BACKUP[/b] your save before adding it![/i]


[b]Note:[/b] [i] I don't know if there's any compatibility issue with another mod, if you find something weird, then use the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/discussion/3008448748/595150868109611135/]Bug Reports[/url] section to let me know.[/i]
[hr]
[h1]F.A.Q[/h1]
[b]Q: Works with Bandits mod?[/b]
[b]A:[/b] It was designed to work. Give it a try, if you find any issue, report it on Bug Reports with details of the problem.

[b]Q: My character stands up when reloading; Is that supposed to happen?[/b]
[b]A:[/b] YES! This is currently a limitation of this mod; I'll try to add reload animations in the future.

[b]Q: Does this mod works with game pads?[/b]
[b]A:[/b] It's supposed to work. If doesn't ,  let me know.

[b]Q: Can you add "..." feature or make "something"?[/b]
[b]A:[/b] Can you support my work on Patreon? If YES, then, I probably can.

[b]Q: Can you fix this "..." problem?[/b]
[b]A:[/b] Sure, when I have time.
[hr]
[quote][b]IMPORTANT: I don't authorize anyone to copy or change my script without permission. If you want to put my mod in your pack and publish, or make any change to it, you have to ask me first. Thanks![/b][/quote]

publishedfiledetails.title: True Crouching
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[b][h1] I'll update when B42 stable version is released. [/h1][/b]
[hr][/hr]
While sneaking, crouching animations will be played instead of sneaking animations.
In other words, replaces sneaking animations with crouching animations.

Includes crouched [b]idle[/b], [b]walking[/b], [b]running[/b], [b]turning[/b] and [b]SHOOTING[/b].
[hr][/hr]
This mod will very slightly reduce your movement speed while sneaking. This is vanilla behavior.
[hr][/hr]
Has a sub mod named [i]"True Crouching - Shooting Only"[/i].
This will enable only the crouched shooting animations. It won't change sneaking animations.
[b]Enable only ONE of the mods.[/b]
[hr][/hr]
[h1] Why this mod? [/h1]
I don't like the way the character looks while sneaking. I always wanted the sneak key to function as a crouch key so I could roleplay(?).
For example, now I can stand on the edge of a roof, crouch, and plan my next move in a realistic looking way.

[h1] How does it work? [/h1]
[b]Does not[/b] add/replace actual animation files, [b]mostly[/b]. I added animations only for crouched shooting.
There are two base sneaking stances in the game: [i]Sneak[/i] and [i]LowSneak[/i]. LowSneak is the crouching animation we all know from every other game.
Normally, this animation is played only when the character is sneaking next to a wall.
I just changed a few lines in some files so that the game plays animations of LowSneak instead of Sneak whether the character is next to a wall or not.

[h1] To do [/h1]
[h3](maybe...)[/h3]
[list]
	[*]Prevent crouching while fractured(and/or burnt?)
	[i](the game allows LowSneak while fractured/burnt in vanilla)[/i]
	[*]Add buff to hit chance when crouched
	[*]Swapping weapons while crouched and aiming a weapon shouldn't transitions to standing
	[*]Block aim ready stance while crouch aiming with melee if there are no zombies in range so the char doesn't stand up
[/list]

[h1] Notes [/h1]
[list]
    [*][b]Conflicts with:[/b]
		[list]
		[*]Arsenal GunFighter ([i]Compatibility addon [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3004680063][u]here[/u][/url][/i])
		[*]Real Full Auto ([i]Weapons will use their default fire rate while shooting crouched[/i])
		[*]Katana Stance ([i]Character will not crouch when idle while holding a katana[/i])
		[*]Braven's Nail Guns ([i]Nailguns' fire rate will be reduced while shooting crouched[/i])
		[/list]
    [*][b]Safe[/b] to add/remove mid-save.
	[*]Works in multiplayer.
    [*]Feedback/Suggestions are welcome.
[/list]

[h1] Recommended mods [/h1]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3008448748] True Crawl [/url] - Adds a [b]prone[/b] stance to the game!
                     You can [b]crawl[/b] everywhere and [b]shoot[/b] while prone.
[h2]Check out my other mods[/h2]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2920735875][IMG]https://i.imgur.com/uMPsEoo.png[/IMG][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2921642476][IMG]https://i.imgur.com/K6Zhrv7.png[/IMG][/url][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3013901070][IMG]https://i.imgur.com/RPS3sfG.png[/IMG][/url]

[hr][/hr]
                                                [url=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/the_bobcat][IMG]https://img.buymeacoffee.com/button-api/?text=Buy%20me%20a%20coffee!&emoji=&slug=the_bobcat&button_colour=ff8700&font_colour=000000&font_family=Cookie&outline_colour=000000&coffee_colour=FFDD00[/IMG][/url]
My third mod. Learned a little PZ animation.
It took a few hours to figure out how to do it. Then I implemented crouched shooting which really wore me out :/
                                                       [IMG]https://i.imgur.com/6OBlYju.gif[/IMG]
[hr][/hr]

Mod ID: TrueCrouchingSO

publishedfiledetails.title: True Music
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[url=patreon.com/_tsar][img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2047488292130357038/307A1EFBD98F7B63C736466AACD5CF58235FB88A/[/img][/url]

[h1] It's time for true music in Project Zomboid again. [/h1]
The mod allows all users to add their music to the game. In addition, you can add your own vinyl covers.

Features of the mod:
[list]
[*]item "Boombox" (powered by batteries)
[*]item "Pocket player" (powered by batteries)
[*]item "Vinyl player" (works only on electricity)
[*]all cars are equipped with a cassette player
[*]playing music lures zombies
[/list]

[quote]
[h3]How to add your own music in SINGEPLAYER (only for Windows):[/h3]
Video tutorial: https://youtu.be/9DZghSBPOy4
[olist]
[*]Go to \workshop\content\108600\2613146550\mods\True Music\media\yourMusic

[*] Extract the contents of yourMusic.rar [b]or[/b] yourMusic.zip (before rename the file "yourMusic.zi" to "yourMusic.zip")  to the yourMusic folder.

[*]Place audio files in mp3, wav, ogg format in the TCBoombox and TCVinylplayer folders.

[*](optional) Place vinyl cover photos in TCVinylplayer folder in jpg format. They should be named the same as the music track file. Each music file can have its own cover.

[i]For example, the file with the track is called "AC DC - Highway To Hell (1979).mp3", the file with the cover should be called "AC DC - Highway To Hell (1979).jpg".[/i]

The easiest way to find the cover is when you google it: "AC DC - Highway To Hell vinyl cover".

[*]Run AddYourMusicToTheMod.exe. Depending on which folder the files is placed in, either a cassette or vinyl will be generated.

[*]After that, your cassettes and vinyl records will start spawning in the world, you just have to find them.
[/olist]
[/quote]


[quote]
[h3]How to add your music in the MULTIPLAYER:[/h3]
Video tutorial: https://youtu.be/b7SUjPzmgfM
[olist]
[*] Create a new mod from the template: https://disk.yandex.com/d/iS8o8ZxnV7UxLA

[*] [b]WARNING[/b] In the file mod.info change the ID to your own
[*] [b]WARNING[/b] To ensure that your mod does not conflict with other True Music addons, you need to rename the files:
[code]media\lua\server\Items\TCGLoadingTCBoombox.lua
media\lua\server\Items\TCGLoadingTCVinylplayer.lua
media\lua\shared\TCGMusicDefenitionsTCBombox.lua
media\lua\shared\TCGMusicDefenitionsTCVinylplayer.lua
media\scripts\TCGMusicScriptTCBoombox.txt
media\scripts\TCTCGMusicScriptTCVinylplayer.txt
media\scripts\TCGSoundsTCBombox.txt
media\scripts\TCGSoundsTCVinylplayer.txt[/code]
For example, add your mod Workshop ID to their names:
[code]media\lua\server\Items\TCGLoadingTCBoombox2722332157.lua
media\lua\server\Items\TCGLoadingTCVinylplayer2722332157.lua
media\lua\shared\TCGMusicDefenitionsTCBombox2722332157.lua
media\lua\shared\TCGMusicDefenitionsTCVinylplayer2722332157.lua
media\scripts\TCGMusicScriptTCBoombox2722332157.txt
media\scripts\TCTCGMusicScriptTCVinylplayer2722332157.txt
media\scripts\TCGSoundsTCBoombox2722332157.txt
media\scripts\TCGSoundsTCVinylplayer2722332157.txt[/code]
[*] Send the mod to all users of the server (we allow to publish a mod created from the template)
[*] If you want to upload your work to Workshop, you will need to delete folders and files:
[code]
\media\yourMusic\audioConverter
\media\yourMusic\pictureConverter
\media\yourMusic\AddYourMusicToTheMod.exe
\media\yourMusic\DeleteYourMusicFromTheMod.exe
[/code]
[/olist]
[/quote]

[img]https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1660101375273576639/0C12E325C464F5DC166E5FF2AB70A43581BED64F/[/img]

请不要恶意刷各种梗，评论区只留用反馈。
三：感谢清单
1.我的师傅，同时是不在服装店的作者：查拉图斯特拉如是说

This is a character card module where you can buy Racegirl clothes for 68 bills in the composition column.
Two: Disclaimer
This module does not have any profit, I only in the love of racehorse mother to make this module, without any commercial behavior.
If any person or organization uses my module for creation that does not conform to the regulations of the relevant game company, the author of this module does not assume any responsibility.
Three: Thank you list
1. My teacher, who is also the author of not in Clothing stores: 查拉图斯特拉如是说
Without her guidance and help, I would not have been able to make this module.
2. My friend and the author of the original uma module: Mir0ki
He is the author of the original Mamiang module, and he has been a great help to my module. But it's a shame his mod was taken down.
3. My friend who is also working on a Left 4 Dead module: GEtFiRe

publishedfiledetails.title: Undead Honor
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]I am on an indefinite hiatus from Project Zomboid. Feel free to use my code for future mods, and feel free to update my mods for B42. [b]Please do not reuse their exact names or mod id's[/b] to avoid confusion and bugs for B41 players. I can only guarantee my mods worked when used alone before B42 dropped. I will no longer be retesting them when people have conflicts. Thanks for the support over the years.[/h1]

[h2]Undead Honor makes zombies refrain from eating players who are still loading game assets until those players are actually ready to play. With this mod, players can load into the game safely without fear of dying before they can move.[/h2]
[list]
[*][b]This mod works in solo and multiplayer.[/b]
[*][b]This mod can be added or removed safely at any time.[/b][/list]

[h2]More Details for People Who Like Them[/h2]

In vanilla Project Zomboid, no zombie has even the tiniest imaginable shred of honor. Zombies will eat you while your game is still loading even though you cannot see or do anything, and they will feel absolutely no shame. Then everything will become visible, and you will be dead, and they will step on your body until you reanimate or ragequit. I get it. Maybe zombies [i]should[/i] have no honor. It's a vibe. But, for many people connecting to multiplayer servers and loading heavily modded solo games every day, it's a frequently frustrating and unfair vibe.

This mod makes zombies honorable. If zombies target you, they will immediately realize that you haven't yet moved or aimed, and they will therefore change their minds and refrain from attacking you until you start moving, aiming, attacking, or performing actions.
[list]
[*]Options exist in the sandbox for determining how quickly zombies react after players begin moving or aiming.
[*]Zombies will approach new players and may begin to lunge once, but should not actually deal damage if the player is not yet ready.
[*]This mod does not require the host to disable any anti-cheat protection.
[*]This mod does not set [b]any[/b] cheat-associated states (such as God mode or invisibility) on the player; it only affects the behaviors of zombies that are either lunging at or visible to the player.
[*]This mod will not heal the player or have any other odd unintended side effects to my knowledge.
[*]Using [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Mod Options[/url], players can enable an optional icon that indicates when zombies are waiting for the player to be ready. Mod Options is optional; it is not required for this mod to work. It's only necessary if players want access to the indicator option.
[*]Players can enable both [b]Undead Honor[/b] and [b]Mod Options[/b] in the main menu of Project Zomboid before joining a server if they would like to enable the indicator icon in game options before spawning into a world.
[*][b]This mod will still allow characters to die by other means if players quit and reload while they are on the verge of death, so don't expect it to protect them from everything.[/b][/list]

[h2][b][i]This mod only protects players from zombies. It does not prevent other possible sources of damage, such as someone lighting your house on fire while you're not online. It just prevents zombies from attacking players until they take actions that could be a threat to zombies.[/i][/b][/h2]

Please let me know if you have any feedback, requests, or issues, and feel free to try [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/zendachi/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]my other mods[/url] if you like this one!

For an even greater sense of security, consider running [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3298519559]Advanced Death Log[/url] as well. It can allow you to easily restore a lot of your lost character data when you die.

[b]Thanks to [url=https://www.1001fonts.com/users/astigmatic/]Brian J Bonislawsky of the Astigmatic One Eye Typographic Institute[/url] for the great free font.[/b]

Shout-out to Stix for help with the icon!

[b]Since y'all seem to enjoy not losing player data tragically, you might also enjoy my other latest mod, [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3298519559]Advanced Death Log[/url], which can not only track data related to player deaths but help restore lost skills, traits, and inventory. Additionally, [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3303970420]Magic Chat[/url] will ensure that your players see server messages even if their chats are closed so that they won't lose data when servers restart, while also adding gamepad support to the chat interface![/b]

[h3]Thanks in advance to everyone who helps the visibility of my mods by clicking thumbs up. I put a lot of effort into making bug-free mods that play nicely alongside hundreds of others, so it's nice to know they're being appreciated by everyone who might want them, and upvotes make that happen![/h3]

[url=https://ko-fi.com/burryaga][img]https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/brandasset/kofi_button_dark.png[/img][/url]

Workshop ID: 3302050113
Mod ID: UndeadHonor

publishedfiledetails.title: Undead Survivor
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1][b]This mod adds currently 5 new outfits which only spawn on zombies!
More to come time to time [/b][/h1]

[hr][/hr] 

[h1]Features:[/h1]

- Outfits will spawn on zombies, this is the only way you can find them
- You can tuck the trousers into your shoes
- Hood up and Hood down features for hoodies
- All objects have proper ground objects when placed down
- Male and female compatible
- Blood, dirt and holes appear on the right spots
- And more individual features on certain outfits!



[img]https://i.imgur.com/hEeaU5f.png[/img]
The Stalker is geared for getting in close combat and situations where you have to be light and agile. If you are lucky and find his knife, then you cannot be better prepared for any melee encounter. Only downside is that due to its lightweight tailoring, the outfit does not withstand very cold and rainy weather.
[olist]
    [*]Stalker Mask [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Stalker Cloak
    [*]Stalker Jacket
    [*]Stalker Trousers
    [*]Stalker Gloves [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Stalker Boots
    [*]Stalker Knife [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
[/olist] 



[img]https://i.imgur.com/qU3Ne1T.png[/img]
The Nomad has the perfect outfit to hike through the lone wilderness in the cold and rainy weather. They aren't fighters; their outfit will slow you down and doesn't have the best protection against the dead, but if you are lucky, you can spot one with a backpack which can hold all your equipment if you are strong enough to carry it.
[olist]
    [*]Nomad Mask
    [*]Nomad Parka
    [*]Nomad Trousers
    [*]Nomad Boots
    [*]Nomad Backpack [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
[/olist]



[img]https://i.imgur.com/12DnBQa.png[/img]
The Prepper, aka. Gear-junkie, isn't best suited for infectious bites. His strategy is to keep death 10 feet away. To make sure he doesn't run out of ammo, he's equipped with gun magazine pouches and small, but efficient bags which can be mounted to the vest as some sort of backpack. If the walking dead gets too close, he has a small knife attached to his vest and can retrieve it by a quick hand, in addition to a flashlight.

[olist]
    [*]Prepper Helmet
    [*]Prepper Gasmask
    [*]Prepper Jacket
    [*]Prepper Trousers
    [*]Prepper Flashlight [i](Can be attached to the vest)[/i]
    [*]Prepper Knife [i](Can be switched between stab and swing attacks which have slightly different stats)[/i]
    [*]Prepper Vest (Can be combined with bags)
    [*]Prepper Vest with Bags [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Prepper Bags [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
[/olist] 



[img]https://i.postimg.cc/Vsp2H10D/Headhunter-Description.png[/img]
Like a stoic stone from a distance, the Headhunter observes and waits for his victims to appear. His gasmask and long mantle covers him from hazard rains and the storm while doing so.
The customized rifle is heavy and slow, but a deadly and reliable weapon with 20 bullets and a range you haven't seen before. No victim can escape once spotted.
[olist]
    [*]Headhunter Gasmask
    [*]Headhunter Mantle
    [*]Headhunter Backpack [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Headhunter Rifle [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Headhunter Scope[i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
[/olist]



[img]https://i.postimg.cc/L8Yd8bwz/Amazona-Description.png[/img]
A team of women who retain their beauty in dark times and still strong enough to survive. Their self-made clothing can be deceiving; a dress and cloak made of thick fabric and fur gives good protection from bites and keeps them warm. In addition, they also have a hip bag that keeps them light and flexible. Their spear is an effective weapon and tool for hunting or fishing.
[olist]
    [*]Amazona Cloak
    [*]Amazona Dress
    [*]Amazona Hip Bag [i](Does not spawn always)[/i] ---> Double click to equip <---
    [*]Amazona Boots
    [*]Amazona Spear [i](Does not spawn always)[/i]
    [*]Amazona Makeup [i](Always available)[/i]
    [*]And some more Extras
[/olist]

[hr][/hr] 

Credits to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/vilespring/myworkshopfiles/] Vilespring [/url] for a more elegant and non-destructive attachments code!

Credits to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/authentic_peach] Authentic Peach [/url] for alot of help with attachments and other stuff and his mod [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2335368829] AuthenticZ[/url] which i used for many things as template! Thanks!

Credits to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/Arkorinho/myworkshopfiles/] 「Arko Piktuviry」 [/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198442509852/] Siowar [/url] for creating the spanish translation! 
And Lordben-wan for the Portugal and [url=steamcommunity.com/id/heafoxyz/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]Hea[/url] for the russian! Thanks!

Thanks to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/UdderlyEvelyn/] UdderlyEvelyn  [/url] and Konijima for being helpful!

[h1] [b]FAQ:[/b][/h1] 
[b]Any Actively supported Mods?[/b] 
"Udderly Attachmnents":
Its a framework to make it easy for modders to share custom attachments with each others weapons.
"FirearmsB41"
It adds more Firearm stuff and changes some behavoirs.
For example you keep your weapon in your hand after adding/removing attachments.

[b]Will this mod work with a existing savegame?[/b] 
Yes

[b]Which game version works with this mod?[/b] 
I have tested it with game version 41.78
Also it does work in MP

[b]Hair Pokes through the hoodies[/b]
Make sure that you have installed the mod "Fluffy hair".
If you have Fluffy Hair installed and the [b]Vanilla[/b] hair still pokes through then please report like so:
"Gender - Outfit - Hairstyle"

[b]I cannot find your Outfit / The Outfits are too rare[/b]
The Outfit is indeed very rare. Its hard to say how much the chance is exactly.
But i have seen a few of them after a few minutes of running around in a city with zombie count on "insane".
In your sandbox settings you can set the relative chances under the "Undead Survivor" Page.

[b]Am i allowed to use this mod in a Server mod pack?[/b]
Yes

[b]What outfits will come next?[/b] 
Sometimes i post in my "kofi" stuff i am working on.

[url=https://ko-fi.com/scavengersmods][img]https://i.imgur.com/k8tvuaC.png[/img][/url]


Workshop ID: 2713921292
Mod ID: UndeadSuvivor
