publishedfiledetails.title: Vanilla Vehicle Enhancer
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
*** NOTICE OF ABANDONMENT ***     *** 03/29/2025 ***

THIS MOD'S AUTHOR IS NO LONGER INTERESTED IN UPDATING THIS MOD.  THEREFORE THE AUTHOR GRANTS ANYONE THE RIGHT TO FEEL FREE TO USE THE FILES CONTAINED IN THE MOD AS THEY SO CHOOSE.  UPDATE THE MOD FOR B42 OR USE THE FILES AS A SPRINGBOARD TO CREATE YOUR OWN MOD, THE AUTHOR GIVES YOU HIS FULL BLESSING.  FEEL FREE TO POST YOUR UPDATES AND YOUR OWN VERSIONS TO THE WORKSHOP.  MAYBE JUST GIVE CREDIT WHERE DUE IF YOU FEEL LIKE.



10/28/2023 The Step Van Update

**** READ! READ! READ! ****
THIS MOD REPLACES SOME STOCK FILES AND TEXTURES. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND STARTING A NEW GAME BEFORE USING THIS MOD. DO NOT BLAME ME IF YOU MESS UP YOUR SAVE FILE.


Over 400 skins based on real world vehicles with realistic paint colors! Included are new wheels as well as textures for the wrecked and crispified versions also!

This mod got started when I got tired of looking at all the weirdly pastel colored cars that spawn in the game by default so I decided to try and make things a bit more realistic. This basic goal got out of hand probably due to a case of OCD and this mod is the result.

This mod replaces all textures for all vehicles in the vanilla game except for the trailer which I might do for a future update. The aim of this mod is to enhance the look of the default vehicles and to add some much needed variety to the vanilla motor pool.

There are now three different types of police cars; a standard police car, a sheriff's car, and a state trooper car. These skins are based on the mod "Proper Police Skins" by Söze with permission. You don't need both mods for this to work but you will have to pick one or the other as they do conflict with each other.

This mod will likely have problems working alongside any mod that messes with the files for the vanilla cars. I have tested this mod with a few vehicle related mods and have encountered issues with two mods for sure: Eggon's Worthwhile Cars and the Crashed Cars mod. Eggon's Worthwhile Cars causes some vehicle's textures to not show up properly and the Crashed Cars Mod causes the textures for the wrecked cars to not show up properly. This issue persisted no matter what order I ran the mods in. If you are fine with these problems you can continue using those mods.

Workshop ID: 2788428718
Mod ID: VVehicleEnhancer

publishedfiledetails.title: Vanilla vehicles animated
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1](VVA) Vanilla Vehicles Animated[/h1]
[h2]What this mod does?[/h2]
There are many cool mods that add vehicles with openable doors, meaning the game can handle such animations.
But vanilla vehicles remain as solid bricks.
This mod fixes that. Vehicle models are reworked - split into multiple objects, and code added to display vanilla vehicles. As a free bonus of it - if a part is removed (or torn off) it would become visually missing, rather than tinted grey.

[h2]Why are Dash Roamer, Drive90s and other modded cars no longer animated?[/h2]
Trying to keep the mod more focused so since they are not based on vanilla models and not all of them were transitioned to build 42 - that created a bunch of issues making sure stuff got updated correctly. So I made a hard decision to drop them from this mod.
I am repackaging all the animated model patches for those vehicles and will publish them as a couple of separate workshop items - for build 41 and 42 separately. But at this moment they are just remived as a hotfix to them getting broken by latest code rafactoring.

[h2]B41 or B42?[/h2]
Both. This workshop item contains versions both for Build 41 and Build 42. Though I am planning to move Build 42 version to a different workshop item eventually and make this item Build41 legacy only.

[h2]Multiplayer?[/h2]
By itself only the local player would see animations in action. Remote players would only ubdate parts state when they moved far enough from vehicle and then returned to it so server sends current state for all parts.
To fix this issue you need to use a mod that patches in server signals to update parts state when they change
For build 42 use steam://openurl/https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3685499657
For build 41 use steam://openurl/https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2959512313


[h2]Existing save - safe?[/h2]
Yes. This mod only changes the way vehicles are displayed and does not interfere with save data in any way. It is safe to add or remove this mod on existing saves/servers.

[h2]There are many mods in this item. Which ones I should enable?[/h2]
[h3]Vanilla Vehicles Animated[/h3] - Main mod. Nothing works without it.
[h3]disable passenger rendering (VVA_cullseats)[/h3] - (optional) - The main mod enables rendering character model in the interior. But animations for characters switching seats, exiting vehicle or aiming a weapon if a window is rolled down, are not set up, so defailts ones (for character standing on ground) are used, resulting in character clipping through vehicle roof. If this bothers you - enable this mod. It will prohibit my mod adding passenger rendering. But if some other mod also enables interior character rendering it might not work.
[h3]Standard Vehicle Upgrades Patch (VanillaVehiclesAnimated_SVU)[/h3] - (optional) - If you wand to MadMax your vehicles using armor from Standard Vehicle Upgrades, by default the armor would be rendered static. So an open door would clip through armor plate. Enabling this optional mod patches armor definition scripts to make armor animated too.
[h3]ApocalypticallySlowDoors (VVA_slowdoors)[/h3] - depricated - In Build 41 version using Fancy Handwork together with this mod could cause a bug with door close animation being unable to play properly because it was running too fast. This mod slowed all animations down to avoid this bug.
[h3]disable nascar headlight spawn (VVA_nascarlights)[/h3] - depricated - Build 42 specific. Functionality currently rolled into main mod. Added "plastic caps" in place of headlights on nasrac vehicles, that could be replased with actual headlights if character chose to install them.

[h2]Just Vanilla Vehicles?[/h2]
No. Some mods that add reskins of vehicles based on vanilla models (i.e. Donny's Company Cars) are also supported. And if you know such a mod that is not supported - please let me know and I would gladly cover it in an update. Also Vanilla Vehicle Enhancer (both 41 and 42 versions) are supported, including custom models for all vehicles that match enhanced textures with geometry.

[h2]Can a vanilla-model based vehicle mod hook into animations without requiring update to this mod?[/h2]
At this point - I feel the code is settled enough, so yes. If you are making a mod that adds more vehicles that are reskins of vanilla models - they can be easily added as long as you don't change shape of windows and headlights.
Also if your mod is not based on vanilla models, I am eager to help you set up the models and scripts to have animations on their own.

[h2]How many people are working on this mod?[/h2]
One. Just me in my free time. If you want to support me - the best way would be to show up to [url=www.twitch.tv/hilvon1984]my Twitch[/url] streams 8am till 1pm GMT on saturdays and sundays. I mostly work on another huge mod adding animations to PZK Vanilla Like Cars pack...
You can also support me on [url=https://boosty.to/hilvon1984]Boosty[/url].

Workshop ID: 3281755175
Mod ID: VanillaVehiclesAnimated
Mod ID: VanillaVehiclesAnimated_SVU
Mod ID: VVA_cullseats
Mod ID: VVA_slowdoors
Mod ID: VVA_transparentWindows

publishedfiledetails.title: Vehicle Repair Overhaul
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/8CRHL5v.png[/img]

[b]B41 and B42 COMPATIBLE[/b]

	[hr]						[/hr]

Find a clunker you love but its one zombie tap from disintegration? Fix it up!

[b]Repair and Salvage - Vanilla Vehicles and all the great Workshop Vehicle Creations!![/b]

Adds many more repair options for Hoods, Trunks, Seats, Doors, Gas Tanks, Lights, Windshields, Windows, Tires, Brakes, Suspension, Glove box, Roof Racks, Trailers, Cargo Containers, Armoured Parts & other Vehicle Accessories or Salvage the whole vehicle too removing it from your path!

[b]New Items included[/b]

Fix A Flat - Tire Repair - This will get you by until you switch out the tires - Can be found in Vehicle Trunks.**You can combine cans that you find**

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h2]This mod is safe to add or remove from your existing saves[/h2]

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1] Repair & Salvage [/h1]

The aim of this mod is to let you repair and fix up your vehicle(s)
[b]and[/b] will bring more focus and choices for the mechanics and metal welders amongst us

 [b]-works in MP and SP (and can be installed or removed anytime)[/b]
 -with a shortage of working cars on some servers you can now fix up what you find
 -have a mechanic in your group? put their skills to use
 -collect cars and restore them to their former glory
 -learn your craft and progress, become that master mechanic you always wanted to be
 -grab your blowtorch and break down many vehicle parts into useable items
 -salvage the complete vehicle for many useful items depending on your skill
 -[b]compatible with all vehicle additions on the workshop [/b]
 -built-in support for Valhalla Vehicle Ownership module

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Repair your ride[/h1]

Use varying parts to restore your ride
 -start easy changing tires then with seats, have some ductape, sheets, glue, a spring? you can repair it!
 -Parts have a lot more uses now, from metal bars and springs to rebuild the suspension, light bulbs for light, fabrics for seats and good old ductape for many minor fixes
 -Screws and metal for moderate fixes but progress to using a blow torch and your repairs will be solid!

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Salvage of Vehicle and Parts[/h1]

Salvage parts from one vehicle and use the pieces to repair other parts on other vehicles

Grab your blow torch and mask to break down vehicle parts into useable items!

Salvaging Vehicle parts could provide you with several items in return!
Tear up those old stinky seats and you'll have a chance of gaining those dirty Rags, Leather, Denim or Thread!
Grab your blowtorch and mask, uninstall those beat-up doors and salvage them for a chance of Metal Sheets, Screws, Small Metal Sheets or even Electronical Scrap!
Enjoying those mods that introduce Roof Racks? Well now you can salvage those too!
Each Vehicle part can be salvaged with a chance of gaining up to three salvaged items depending on your Mechanic and Welding skills.

[b]Salvage Vehicle[/b] is now included

Right click on a vehicle and choose "Salvage Vehicle"

This option is available once you have Metal Working skill 4 or above, Mechanics skill 3 or above and requires 10 propane units and a Welders Mask. You can salvage all vehicles except Wrecks*.
This option will completely salvage and remove the vehicle clearing the path.
Depending on your Metal Working skill, you will salvage the vehicle faster and receive many useful items the higher your skill.
I do recommend removing as many parts of the vehicle as you can and empty the vehicle before salvage of the vehicle body. This will give you vehicle parts to use, further salvage options for those parts and your character will have gained more knowledge about vehicles and gained more skill XP in Mechanics and Metal Working.

The Vanilla option for *dismantle wreck option is also still available (only for wrecked vehicles), takes less time but your returns are smaller and less varied with less XP too.

The better you are at Mechanics or Metal Welding will mean your talents will produce better results from the Salvage!
A Mechanic knows the parts he wants, gaining skills in Metal Welding means he can better acquire those parts.

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Suggested workshop items that add to the experience[/h1]

[b]Many Vehicle mods on the workshop are already supported with this mod ! [/b]
The list below are some of my favs

[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/id/KI5/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]KI5's Vehicles[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/id/bls13/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]Cyt Vehicles[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198004947199/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]Sharks Vehicles[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2719592131]Tread's Water Tank Trucks[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1539281445]Crashed Cars[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2787291513]Craft Helper Continued[/URL]
[URL=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2712632417]Viperels Vehicle Spare Parts[/URL]

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Compatibility[/h1]

Good with everything!! I do not overwrite vanilla code, I create additions so it plays nice with any other mod you want to use.
**Place this mod after any vehicle mods or towards the bottom of your mod order for best results**

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]NOTES[/h1]

[strike]Heater repair and Lightbar Repair and Salvage will come eventually to this mod. It requires a different method of coding compared to the regular vehicle repairs and unfortunately I just haven't had the time to incorporate it.[/strike]

For now I suggest the "Easy Heater Repair" and "Easy Lightbar Repair" mods. (B41)

The B42 version now has updated versions of [url=steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2602450182]Easy Heater Repair[/url] and [url=steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2582648054]Easy Lightbar Repair[/url] integrated into it. Credit to [url=steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198037641428/myworkshopfiles/?appid=108600]PipMagnet[/url] for the original mods. If they return and want them removed, I will do so. - SP4RTAN

[h2]Note for server admins[/h2]

Due to the (sometimes) high frequency of updates to this mod, modpacking is allowed so that server admins can apply updates as needed and reduce server downtime.

All that we ask is that you credit us somewhere.

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Contributing on GitHub[/h1]

If you have a translation or want to help add repair options to new vehicles and you know how Project Zomboid scripts work, you can make a pull request on [url=https://github.com/ThisIsSP4RTAN/PZ-VehicleRepairOverhaul]GitHub[/url]

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Thanks to[/h1]

Trealak, DJVirus and all the modders who offer help with code and of course Vehicle creators like filibuster, KI5, fhqwhgad, Diegus, cyt and shark.
Special Thanks to Tofuman!

[h2]Translations[/h2]
Polish Translation by ?DOM.0?
French Translation by KwerTTY
Russian Translation by Macintosh.
German Translation by Thanit.
Chinese Translation by UnsetLay.
Brazilian Portugese Translation by peteR 75hz.
Thai Translation by Riko Prushka.
Turkish Translation by GKarahan.
Updated Italian Translation by Falbor
Updated Chinese Translation by NCFFCN

	[hr]						[/hr]
[h1]Other stuff[/h1]

I'll continue updating this for the foreseeable future either way, but if you want to help keep me awake, you can support me with a coffee. No pressure though :)

[url=https://ko-fi.com/sp4rtan][img]https://i.imgur.com/a8AqU3T.png[/img][/url]

Workshop ID: 2757712197
Mod ID: VehicleRepairOverhaul
Mod ID: VehicleSalvageOverhaulB42

publishedfiledetails.title: Veracious Network's Garage
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Veracious Network's Garage[/h1]

Veracious Network's Garage adds a tire rack, battery shelf w/ integrated charger, and (coming soon) a workbench
for table-top crafting and storage of small tools.  Upgrade your garage today!

Some quick notes: this mod is [b]safe[/b] for existing saves and works for servers in B41.
For B42, it makes use of magazines to learn the recipes, so with existing saves you may need
to regenerate loot or travel to unexplored areas to find the magazines.

[h2]Features[/h2]

[h3]Unpainted Tire Rack (B41 & B42)[/h3]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/preview-tirerack.png[/img]

Craftable tire rack that takes up a 1x1 square that can be placed in any N/E/S/W orientation.
Each rack holds up to 12 tires (or more if you are organized).

[list]
  [*] Has 180kg storage, but only holds tires
  [*] Supports KI5 modded tires
  [*] Full support for singleplayer and multiplayer
  [*] Sprite displays number of tires stored, (up to 12)
[/list]

[b]Recipe (B41):[/b]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/recipe-tirerack.png[/img]

[b]Recipe (B42):[/b]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/recipe-tirerack-b42.png[/img]

[list]
  [*] Level 2 metalworking
  [*] Welding mask ([b]MUST BE WEARING in B41[/b])
  [*] 10x metal pipes
  [*] Propane torch with 5 units of propane
  [*] 1x welding rod
  [*] [i]B42:[/i] Read VN's Garage (Jan 1991) or Mechanics:5;MetalWelding:3
[/list]

Item does not appear in the world (unless added via a story mod) and needs to be crafted.

[b]MULTIPLAYER SERVERS SUPPORTED[/b] Note, at the moment the sprite will flash on adding or removing tires in multiplayer.


[h3]Painted Tire Racks[/h3]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/preview-tirerack-colors.png[/img]

Same functionality as normal rack, but now customizable for your preferred garage theme!

[b]Recipe (B41):[/b]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/recipe-tirerack-paint.png[/img]

[b]Recipe (B42):[/b]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/recipe-tirerack-paint-b42.png[/img]

[list]
  [*] Paintbrush
  [*] 2 units of paint (blue, green, orange, pink, purple, or red)
  [*] 1x unpainted tire rack
[/list]


[h3]Battery Shelf (B42 ONLY)[/h3]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/preview-battery-shelf.png[/img]

Store AND charge your batteries in a single shelf!
(Note, [i]some[/i] electrical and carpentry experience is required, please order straight from VN's Garage for the best quality.)

[b]Recipe (B42):[/b]

[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/recipe-batteryshelf-b42.png[/img]

[list]
  [*] Hammer and Pliers
  [*] 2x wood planks
  [*] 2x nails
  [*] 1x car battery charger
  [*] 1x duct tape
  [*] 6x electric wire
  [*] Read VN's Garage (Feb 1991) or Mechanics:6;Electricity:3;Woodwork:6
[/list]

[h3]Support for Inventory Tetris (B42 ONLY)[/h3]

Support for [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3397561666]Inventory Tetris[/url]
has been added!  To enable it, just add both the main VN's Garage mod and the VN's Garage w/Inventory Tetris.

[hr]


[h2]Planned Features[/h2]

[list]
  [*] Muffler rack (wall mounted)
  [*] Propane storage
  [*] Workbench with pegboard for small tools
  [*] Vehicle glass storage (requested, not planned as to how to implement)
  [*] More?  Feel free to make suggestions.
[/list]

[hr]


[h2]Related Works[/h2]

[list]
  [*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3141544193]Tire Racks in Mechanics & Garages by Champy[/url]
[/list]

[hr]


[h2]More Links and Info[/h2]

Donations towards mod development are always appreciated!
[url=https://ko-fi.com/cdp1337]
	[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/btn-kofi.webp[/img]
[/url]

Check out the source code, submit a bug, or recommend a feature!
[url=https://github.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage]
	[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/btn-github.png[/img]
[/url]

Bored? Come hang out.
[url=https://discord.gg/ymWb5tfN3P]
	[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/btn-discord.png[/img]
[/url]

Follow me on Mastodon for updates or just to chat.
[url=https://social.veraciousnetwork.com/@cdp1337]
  [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/btn-mastodon.png[/img]
[/url]

[hr]

Kudos to Poltergeist https://github.com/Poltergeist-ix for chatting and sharing some ideas.

Big kudos to Slider-Man https://www.youtube.com/@Slider-Man for contributing all the KI5 tire names!

[hr]

The code is [b]OPEN SOURCE[/b] and licensed under the AGPLv3, so redistribution and use is mod packs is ALLOWED.
Please change the name and images if you redistribute however.

Some image sprites are directly based off game assets from The Indie Stone, and are included for non-commercial use
to be used within Project Zomboid only.  Thanks to The Indie Stone for creating
[url=http://projectzomboid.com/]Project Zomboid[/url], which made this possible.
This is an unofficial fan production for non-commercial purposes made under
[url=https://theindiestone.com/forums/index.php?/topic/2530-mod-permissions/#comment-36481]the Indie Stone Terms[/url].

[url=http://theindiestone.com/forums/index.php/topic/2530-mod-permissions/?p=36477]
	[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VeraciousNetwork/PZ-VNGarage/master/docs/images/MODS_02.png[/img]
[/url]

[hr]

[h2]Install Info[/h2]

[list]
  [*] VNGarage is the base mod and is required for these features.
  [*] VNGarage_InventoryTetris is an optional addon to add support for Inventory Tetris.
[/list]

publishedfiledetails.title: Visible Holster
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]With this mod you can see the holster![/h1]

This simple mod let you see holster on your character, which will add some more realism in how looks equipment on you!

This modification makes Holster and Dual Holster from vanilla visible on the player character.

You can wear the belt with holster in 3 variations: Over the jacket, Without the jacket and Without the belt.

In addition, the mod adds 6 color variations of the holster, which will add variety to your appearance.

Also, the modification allows you to craft a Holster and Dual Holster for the your character!

Modification translated: English, Simplified Chinese (CN), Ukrainian, Polish, Italian, Brazilian Portuguese, French, Spanish, Turkish.

[b]The mod includes 3 versions of itself, for the convenience of using the mod for your purposes:[/b]
mrnvsbhltr - original mod that includes the full version of itself (Holster colors, crafting).
mrnvsbhltrvn - version of the mod that only includes the standard holster color from the original game and crafting.
mrnvsbhltwc - version of the mod that only includes the standard holster color from the original game without crafting.

[i] At this moment, the mod may conflict with other modifications that change the standard position of the pistol in the holster! If you see that the gun is not in the holster when it should be, it is most likely due to this problem. I'm already working on a fix for this bug, give me some time to do this. If you know what mod is causing this problem for you, report it to Bugs, then you will greatly help in fixing the problem![/i]

[h1]Did you like the mod? You can support me if you want! [/h1]
[img]https://i.ibb.co/tQYTw8D/ko-fi.png[/img] [url=https://ko-fi.com/moryan]Support on Ko-fi[/url]

publishedfiledetails.title: Water Dispenser
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h2]Features[/h2]
In this mod I try to make everything [b]as Vanilla as possible[/b].
- Dispenser have 250 unit of water like the vanilla dispenser.
- Water Jug can be filled with gasoline for a total of 250 units.
- Vanilla Dispenser automatically converted to custom when loaded in the world.
- Dispenser start with random amount of water.
- Time to take and place bottle depend on the amount of water in it.
- New disabler mod to revert to vanilla water dispenser.

[h2]Disable/Revert to vanilla[/h2]
This feature will only work for game 41.72+.
- Enable `WaterDispenserDisabler` mod (keep it enabled) and disable `WaterDispenser` mod.
- When a custom dispenser is found it will revert back to vanilla.
- This mod must be activated alone and kept enabled to revert the custom dispenser back to vanilla.
- Added this disabler mod for people who would want to stop using water dispenser.

[h2]Languages[/h2]
- English (EN)
- French (FR)
- Spanish (ES)
- Italian (IT)
- Polish (PL) by Insers
- Russian (RU) by BUGS

https://github.com/Konijima/WaterDispenser

publishedfiledetails.title: Water Trailer

New water trailers and mechanics.

[h1]File: rWaterTrailer[/h1]
Adds two new water trailers to the game, fitting to KI5's '86 Oshkosh P19A + Military Trailers. Both have been designed specifically to fit visually and mechanically as good as possible. 

[b]Features:[/b]
[list][*]Custom water storage system.
[*]Take water from items and "natural sources."
[*]Take water from, and add water to rain barrels.
[*]Multiple texture variants (military and civilian).
[*]Animated trunk and tank lids.
[*]The big cistern comes equipped with a pump to speed up the filling process.
[*]The small cistern can be equipped with a filter to tap water that is safe to drink.[/list]

publishedfiledetails.title: Weapon Condition Indicator [41.60+]
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
The mod shows condition (durability) of a weapon attached to the hotbar (back, belt, holster, etc.) or equipped in the primary hand. And many other useful features.

[h2]Features[/h2]
- Two types of weapon condition indicators: icon (star or bubble) and progress bar;
- Blinking when condition lowers and shows an overhead notification;
- Overhead notification will also be displayed when your character falls on the ground and drops an equipped weapon;
- Ammo count and battery charge is dislayed in the hotbar and near the equipped item icon (top left);
- Tooltips with a detailed information about an item, ammo and battery when hovering mouse over the hotbar slots or equipped item icon;
- Fully configurable.

[h2]Options[/h2]
You can configure the mod according to your needs. Go to [i]Options -> Mods -> Weapon Condition Indicator[/i] section.

[h2]Requirements[/h2]
Game version: [b]Build 41.60+ (MP supported)[/b]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2169435993]Mod Options[/url] is [b]required[/b] for this mod to work.

[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
May conflict with other mods that override ISHotbar.lua and/or ISEquippedItem.lua.

Chinese translation by Surgeol: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2674031168]Weapon Condition Indicator 简中汉化[/url]

publishedfiledetails.title: Wells Construction
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1] Information: [/h1]
This mod allows you to build wells!
Wells have been around since the times of the roman empire. I figured an experienced survivor would be able to build a well for long term water storage.

[h1] How it works: [/h1]
[list]
[*]First you need to find and read the magazine "Before the Pipelines".
[*]Once you have the knowledge, you need a hammer and a shovel.
[*]If you have the tools in your inventory, a new option will appear in the world context menu (right-click on the ground).
[*]Place your cursor in the "Build well" option and you will see the skills and materials you need.
[*]You can only place wells in the dirt or grass, and away from the sewage system. This means you cannot place them on roads, trailer parks and towns/cities.
[/list]

Have fun suiting your long term bases with these!

[b]Note:[/b] If you find an error in the translation, please let me know and I'll fix it ASAP.

Workshop ID: 2852690210
Mod ID: wellsConstruction

publishedfiledetails.title: West Point Gated Community
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
I like gated communities. So I made a mod that adds one to the north side of West Point, right by the river.

It includes 6 houses/mansions of variable sizes. Some looking richer than others.

A baitshop has also been added nearby.

IngameMap is done. Foraging Zones are done. Zombie Zones are done.

The Spawn Points include houses inside the Gated Comuunity as well as house located right beside the community's fences.

[spoiler] There's also a secret hidden somewhere. Can you find it ? [/spoiler]

[hr][/hr]

[h1]Compatibility[/h1]

The cell used is 39x22.
I haven't found an other map that uses this cell. If you do, share it in the comments.

Compatible with:
[list]
[*]Over The River
[*]West Point Expansion
[*]West Point Fire Department
[*]West Point Lighthouse
[*]West Point Trailer Park & VHS Store
[*]West Point Suburbs and Farm
[/list]

[hr][/hr]

[b]Do you like this? Try my other maps :[/b]
[list]
[*] [u][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2721653030]West Point Trailer Park & VHS Store[/url][/u] : It adds a VHS store south of West Point since it's missing one.
[*] [u][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2922087098&searchtext=Rosewood]Rosewood VHS and Gun Stores[/url][/u] : It adds a VHS Store and a Gun Store south of Rosewood since it's missing both of them.
[/list]

[hr][/hr]

[h1]"We want to use this map in a mod pack, do we have permission ?"[/h1]
Yes, as long as it's a private mod pack.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]"Can I add this midgame ?"[/h1]
If you haven't visited that part of West Point in your saved game, yes.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]For Multiplayer: instructions given by a comment :[/h1]
How to get the mod to work:
1. Go to the "Map" section of sandbox settings.
2. Choose the map ("West Point Gated Community") from the dropdown menu under "Add an available map to the list".
3. Click on "Muldraugh, KY" in the "Maps used by this server" box and click "Move down" until it's at the bottom of the list.

[hr][/hr]

[h1]B42 version when ?[/h1]
When the mapping tools are updated by the devs.
And when the vanilla map of build 42 has been exported to tmx by someone else.

[hr][/hr]

Workshop ID: 3025055056
Mod ID: WestPointGatedCommunity
Map Folder: WestPointGatedCommunity

publishedfiledetails.title: Working Masks
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
This Mod attempts to make masks (such as gas masks) affect the sickness gain from corpses.
It does not protect against engine fumes inside buildings.

Condition of the mask is considered.

Gas Masks offer full protection at 100% condition.
Other specific masks as surgical masks half protection at 100% condition.
Lastly, items such as Balaclavas, Bandanas, etc. offer 25% protection at full condition, if they cover the mouth and Nose.

Currently supported mods:
Authentic Z, Shark's Law Enforcement Overhaul, Shark and Peach's Military Uniform Improvements, Brita's Armor Pack, Swatpack, ADVANCED GEAR, Paw Low Loot, Undead Survivor, Scrap Armor, Toxic Fog, They Knew, Stalker Armor Pack, slyy's Spicy Attire, Asura Chi, Insurgent - Black Ops Profession
See the discussion thread for a detailed list and protection values,
Any masks added by unsupported mods will work normally, but not offer any protection.

Better Masks Mod provides it's own compatibility mod. It uses different protection values than described above.

Feel free to suggest other masks to support or balance changes.

Should be safe to be added to or removed from an ongoing game as no items are being modified.
I have not tested it in MP, any feedback is welcome, if you give it a try.
Feedback so far has been positive.

Adding this mod to a modpack is permitted, if credit is given and a link to this workshop page is included.

If you'd like to contribute, the source code for this mod can be found here: https://github.com/jaype87/WorkingMasks

Special thanks goes to Werlias for creating the video!

Workshop ID: 2760742937
Mod ID: WorkingMasks

publishedfiledetails.title: Working Seatbelt
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[h1]Description[/h1]
Stay safe in the apocalypse, either by fastening your seatbelt, or relying on your airbag, and reduce the damage taken from car crashes, as you navigate the infected streets of Kentucky!

[h1]Important Note[/h1]
The vehicle damage system in Project Zomboid operates randomly, meaning that even with identical conditions (such as player health, speed, and type of car), two crashes can result in different levels of damage. In one instance, you might end up with 75% health and no serious injuries, while in another, you could have only 20% health and several deep wounds. It's important to know that this mod can't help with crashes that are bad enough to lead to death, due to limitations in the game's scripts. At the current moment, the mod will only reduce damage and fractures resulted in a car crash. For other wounds (Cuts/scratches/etc), they'll be added in later updates

[h1]Compatibility[/h1]
[list]
    [*][b]Other Mods[/b]
    [list]
        [*] Compatible with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3007922923]Proper Vehicle Injuries for MP[/url]
        [*] Compatible with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3048123717]Real Knockouts[/url]
        [*] Compatible with vehicle mods
    [/list]
    [*][b]Game Version[/b] - Tested and works on 41.78.16+. Not tested on earlier versions
    [*][b]Multiplayer[/b] - Functional in multiplayer
    [*][b]Pre-existing saves[/b] - Can be added to your pre-existing save, though sandbox settings will be set at default values, which may not be ideal for everyone
[/list]

[h1]To-do[/h1]
The following feature(s) are planned to be added in the future for this mod
[list]
    [*]Reduce other wounds (Bleeding/Scratches/etc) from car crashes
[/list]

[h1]Known Bugs/Issues[/h1]
[list]
    [*]None at the moment
[/list]

[h1]Translations[/h1]
The mod is currently available in English and multiple other languages, which can be seen at the credits section.

If you'd like to translate this mod to your local language, feel free to do so, upload the translation, and comment out the link so it can be added.
Not sure where to start? Check out [b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3006690572]this guide[/url][/b]

[h1]Links[/h1]

[h1]Feedback[/h1]
Whether it is a suggestion, feedback, or something else you've got on mind, it'd be hugely appreciated!

[img]https://i.ibb.co/Y2qkMXV/Rate-Fav.gif[/img]

[h1]Credits[/h1]

publishedfiledetails.title: Wring Out Clothing
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Closed laundromats got you down? Tired of living in pools of sweat? Use that arm-power to twist and squeeze that wetness away!

The amount of water than can be removed from clothing and towels is dependent on a character's strength.

Strength 10: Wring to 10% wetness
Strength 8/9: Wring to 15% wetness
Strength 6/7: Wring to 20% wetness
Strength 4/5: Wring to 25% wetness
Strength 2/3: Wring to 30% wetness
Strength 0/1: Wring to 35% wetness

Usage: Right click a piece of clothing or towel with a wetness value more than the wetness value corresponding to your character's strength and a 'Wring Clothing' option will appear. Of course hard helmets can't be wringed out.

Shout out to the Youtuber Epokk who created the above video detailing this simple mod.

Workshop ID: 2696083206
Mod ID: wringclothes

publishedfiledetails.title: Yaki's BarberShop
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/p7Fv1Z6.gif[/img]

[quote[b]B42 Compatibility update out now[/b][/quote]

publishedfiledetails.title: Yes' XP on Backstab
publishedfiledetails.file_description:
Every backstab you do with a knife will grant you exp in Sneak. This amount is totally configurable in Sandbox Options.

Basically the best way to grind Sneak right now is by just walking towards a huge horde while on a second floor or something. This can be boring and for some it can feel cheesy. Because of this I created this new way of grinding Sneak XP. Now you can be rewarded by actually sneaking behind unalerted foes.

Have fun moving in the shadows!

By the way, I created a Stealth mod which reworks the entire stealth system. Check it out! [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3053929034][u]Yes' Improved Stealth[/u][/url]

Workshop ID: 3102364952
Mod ID: XPBackstab
